highlights.summary: DJ Academy of Design Admissions 2025 are open. Candidates can visit the official website to apply.

faqs.question: Is DJ Academy Of Design a good college?
faqs.answer:
Hi.DJ Academy of Design is one of the units of the GKD Charity Trust set up in 1983. Located in Coimbatore, the institute has a collaboration with Alagappa University. DJ Academy of Design is also a member of the World Design Organisation and Association of Designers of India.DJ Academy of Design offers both BDes and MDes programs, with admissions determined through entrance exams. 
Facilities: The academy is equipped with modern facilities, including design studios, workshops, and labs that support various design disciplines.
Industry Connections: DJAD often collaborates with industry professionals and organizations, providing students with exposure to real-world scenarios and potential career opportunities.
Thanks

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in DJ Academy Of Design?
faqs.answer:
Hi.DJ Academy of Design's admission process is entrance-based, and prospective students are required to take national or state-level entrance exams like DJAD. This inclusive approach ensures a comprehensive evaluation for admission into various programs, including MDes and BDes, reflecting the institute's commitment to selecting candidates based on standardized criteria and assessing their aptitude for design disciplines.
Thanks

faqs.question: Why M.Des. is considered as the top course at DJ Academy Of Design?
faqs.answer:
M.Des is considered as the top programme at DJ academy because it has 3 different courses to choose from and it helps the students to grow. students who have studied M.Des have a good career path.
The DJ academy possesses a rich placement environment with a variety of well-known companies. The best brains of the academy are provided with ideal opportunities that they deserve to continue with their career. Both national and international brands offer placement opportunities in this academy.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes at DJ Academy of Design are extended at the UG and PG levels. These courses are its BDes and MDes programmes, respectively and are offered under a range of specialisations. BDes and MDes are offered under the following specialisations of:
The fees for the BDes course at DJ Academy of Design stands at INR 18.5 Lakhs, while comparatively the MDes course fee is INR 10.4 Lakhs. Candidates can take a look below at the DJ Academy of Design popular programmes:

placements.overview:
The DJ Academy Of Design placement statistics have not been released by the institute. However it is noted that DJAD has a dedicated placement cell and academia-industry interface. Students at DJAD are exposed to industries and design establishments through live projects, industry projects and internships at top-notch studios. DJAD opens the door for students to work in the creative industry. The internship set up by the institute lasts two month and are held April to June.

The institute also conducts various in-house and outsourced trainings for the students and organises pre-placement talks, competitions, studio-industrial visits, workshops, etc. Some of the potential recruiters of this college are Infosys, Magic Crate, Funskool, HCL, Nilkamal, Schneider Electric, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    Some of the names of top recruiters of the DJ Academy of Design are mentioned below:DJ Academy of Design Top RecruitersInfosys,  HCLMagic CrateFunskoolTCS 50Pricol
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of the DJ Academy of Design?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: DJ Academy Of Design extends offline programs across different levels, including UG and PG. These courses are BDes at the UG level and MDes at the PG level. These courses are extended under a range of specialisations or streams such as Communication Design, Industrial Design, User Experience, Space & Furniture Design, etc. The fee structure for these courses consists of tuition fees, security deposit, admission fees, etc. and can range around INR 10.4 Lakhs and INR 18.5 Lakhs. Students can learn more about the DJ Academy Of Design eligibility, courses and fees below:

faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility criteria for the MDes course at DJ Academy of Design is that the candidate should have passed the undergraduate programme and have cleared the DJAD Entrance Exam for Design (DEED). Further, the admission process is followed by the Personal Interview conducted by DJAD, Coimbatore. During the entrance exam and Personal Interview, the design aptitude of applicants will be evaluated along with their skills in Sketching, Visualisation, Creativity, and Sense of understanding & solving problems.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the MDes course at DJ Academy of Design?

faqs.answer: A:    The documents required for admission to DJ Academy Of Design include the filled application form, Passport size photographs, the photocopy of the 10th & 12th standard mark sheets, the photocopy of the Undergraduate degree & mark sheet, the photocopy of the valid and qualified CEED/UCEED scorecard, the photocopy of the Aadhaar card, the photocopy of the PAN card and two passport size photographs. There is also an application fee of INR 1,500 to be paid through an application fee demand draft.
faqs.question: What are the documents required for admission to DJ Academy Of Design?

faqs.answer: A:    Hi. Entrance exams are accepted by DJ Academy Of Design for admission to M.Des:Enrollment into the Postgraduate Programme is determined by the scores from the Undergraduation examination, performance in the DJAD Entrance Exam for Design 2023 (DEED 2024), and the Personal Interview at DJAD, Coimbatore. DEED 2024 and the Personal Interview assess applicants’ design aptitude, evaluating skills in Sketching, Visualisation, Creativity, and Problem-solving.During the interview, candidates are required to present a Work Portfolio showcasing their creative endeavors, such as drawings, paintings, photographs, films/videos, craftwork, projects, models, etc.Thanks.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Communication Design - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: A gamble with faculty and courses, good infrastructure and a creative environment.

review_content.Placements: Placements are available for the final project that is done by the students in their fourth year. Placements weren't offered for my batch during the third year summer internship. Many of the placements for the final project are big names, but they all fall under a more corporate setting.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has an excellent library with a very good selection of design books. Recently the workshops have been refurbished and are in their prime. The media labs and other facilities are great, but getting permissions to use these facilities are getting harder. The studio space offers a creative environment, but Wi-Fi facilities are not the most reliable and only one device per student can be registered to the Wi-Fi. The mess and canteen services are sub par at best. The hostels have the bare minimum but are well maintained. Very little kitchen facilities are present at the hostel and the laundry services are minimum as well. Recently many problems have accorded with the laundry and hostel kitchen and no maintenance has taken place of the same.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Industrial Design - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A decent college that can fulfill your design goals.

review_content.Placements: Since I am still in college and have not passed out yet, I can’t give you the best details on placements. But from what I have heard, my seniors who have passed out and those who tried for internships in the 3rd year have gotten good opportunities with the portfolios they presented.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is well maintained, with a peaceful and green environment that supports focused learning and creativity. The design studios and classrooms are equipped with the basic infrastructure required for hands-on learning, including a common workshop with all kinds of materials and faculty available at all times. Common areas are spacious, and the campus provides a calm space for students to explore. The campus is a favorite place for any nature lover. The hostel facilities are pretty decent, with all essential amenities and infrastructure ensuring a sense of community among students. Security and cleanliness receive due attention, ensuring a safe and hygienic stay.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Communication Design - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: If you want to learn design, this is the best place.

review_content.Placements: Talking about placements, under communication design itself, there are plenty of career opportunities. Each subject can turn out to be a career. For example, you learn advertisement, filmmaking, branding, packaging design, UI/UX design, animation, and many other subjects under the umbrella of communication design. In the future (maybe after the 4th year), students can choose whatever they love to do. In a batch of 20, each person is interested in different branches of design. So, one company cannot come to the college and recruit all students. You should find the company that fits you.

admission_overview.title: DJ Academy of Design Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: DJ Academy Of Design admission is entrance-based. The institute offers UG and PG degree in courses like BDes and MDes respectively. DJ Academy of Design admission is offered based on its in-house entrance exam, namely DJAD Entrance Exam on Design (DEED). Moreover, the applications for admission to UG and PG courses are accepted in online mode only. More details around DJ Academy Of Design admissions are elaborated in the article below.

eligibility_selection.title: DJ Academy of Design Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: DJ Academy Of Design course admission is entrance-based mainly. The institute offers undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in Design courses. Students need to clear the basic eligibility and selection rounds to get a seat at the institute. The institute also requires students to submit the work portfolio and interview. Interested students can check below the eligibility and selection criteria for DJ Academy Of Design courses: BDes

courses_table.eligibility: - Class 12 in relevant subjects with a minimum 50% aggregate. - Three year Diploma with 50% aggregate - Age should not exceed 22 years as of Jul 31
courses_table.selection_criteria: DJAD Entrance Exam on Design (DEED) + PI + Portfolio

courses_table.eligibility: - Graduation with a minimum 50% aggregate - Diploma of minimum 4 years duration in Design / Fine Arts / Applied Arts / Architecture with a minimum of 50% - Age should be more than 20 years and less than 25 years as of Jul 31
courses_table.selection_criteria: DJAD Entrance Exam on Design (DEED) + PI + Portfolio

faqs.answer: No, DJ Academy of Design admissions are not merit-based. The academy selects students purely on an entrance basis. Interested students have to appear for the DEED exam. Those shortlisted then will be called for Personal Interview.
faqs.question: Are DJ Academy Of Design admissions merit-based?

admission_process.title: DJ Academy of Design Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: DJ Academy Of Design admission processstarts with application, selection, and admission confirmation. The application process at DJ Academy Of Design is online. Interested students can follow the steps below to complete theDJ Academy Of Design admission procedure:

Registration: Students need to register for the course online at the website of the institute. The application and portfolio (essential for screening) has to be submitted with necessary documents and application fees.

Selection Process:DJ Academy Of Design admission is based on a validDJAD Entrance Exam on Design(DEED) score for both BDes and MDes programmes. The final selection is done based on candidates' performance in a PI round. Further, student's work portfolio is also considered.

Admission Confirmation:After the completion of all the selection rounds, the finalised candidates must complete the document verification process and pay theDJ Academy of Design feesto confirm their admission. The final selection is made based onacademic performance + DEED performance + Porfolio strength + PI.

admission_process.title: Technical Institute of Interior and Fashion Studies Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Technical Institute of Interior and Fashion Studies , Kochi admission process 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers admission to UG, PG, and diploma courses in the stream ofDesign.Technical Institute of Interior and Fashion Studies, Kochi provides direct admission based on the last qualifying exam of candidates. The application process is conducted in bothonline and offlinemodes. Read the following article to learn more about Technical Institute of Interior and Fashion Studies admission for the Kochi campus.

Technical Institute of Interior and Fashion Studies admission is completelymerit-based. Students who have passed Class 12 are eligible for undergraduate programmes whereas a UG degree is a must for admission to postgraduate courses. Listed below are the courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria for theTechnical Institute of Interior and Fashion Studies courses:

The Technical Institute of Interior and Fashion Studies admission process consists of multiple steps. Students are offereddirect admissionafter the fulfilment of the basic eligibility criteria. For offline admission, candidates can also visit the campus directly and complete the process for their desired course. Check below the detailed steps for theTechnical Institute of Interior and Fashion Studies admission process 2025:

Step 1: Application ProcessThe Technical Institute of Interior and Fashion Studies application process for the Kochi campus is conducted in both online and offline modes. Candidates can either apply on the institute's official website or get an offline application form from the institute's administrative campus.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

The selection to all the UG, PG, and diploma courses at the Technical Institute of Interior and Fashion Studies, Kochi, is merit-based. Students are admitted based on their scores obtained in the last qualifying exam of their previous education. However, students must pass Class 10/ 12 to get admission to UG and Diploma courses. Additionally, a UG degree is a must for admission to PG courses.
Step 3: Final Admission
After the final selection, candidates must pay a certain amount of theTechnical Institute of Interior and Fashion Studies admission feeto secure their seats.

college_info.intro:
R.R. Group of Institutions offers courses such as BTech and MBA as popular courses in full-time mode. The Institute offers these courses for the duration varying from 2 years to 4 years on the basis of merit and valid entrance scores. Furthermore, R.R. Group of Institutions considers Class 12 qualification for UG level programmes with a minimum aggregate of 45%.
Whereas, for courses such as MBA, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation. R.R. Group of Institutions offers these courses with a tuition fee ranging from INR 1.7 Lakh to INR 4 Lakh. For more details on R.R. Group of Institutions popular programmes, check out the table below:

Whereas, for PG level programmes, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation. In addition to this, candidates must secure a valid entrance score in accepted entrance exams.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: R.R. Group of Institutions offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in offline mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, UG Diploma and D.El.Ed. Whereas, at PG level, R.R. Group of Institutions offers course such as MBA/PGDM. R.R. Group of Institutions fee structure for all the courses is around INR 94,300 to 4,02,300.

faqs.answer: A:    R. Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have completed 3 years Diploma in Agriculture Engineering with at least 50% marks in aggregate (45% for SC/ ST) are eligible.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th std. with above mentioned marks from any recognised Board.D.EdCandidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised board.B.ArchCandidate who have passed Diploma in Architecture (10+3) from recognised board/university are also eligible.MBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed Graduation with mentioned marks from recognised university.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in R. Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses?

faqs.answer: A:    R.R. Group of Institutions MBA eligibility requires students to complete graduation from a recognised university. In addition to clearing the minimum educational qualification specified by the college, students must also provide entrance exam scores. Alternatively, candidates are also offered direct admission provided they satisfy the criteria set by the institute. Students can provide scores obtained in CUET PG/ RR Entrance test, or any other accepted exam.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at R.R. Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer: A:    R.R. Group of Institutions BTech eligibility requires candidates to complete Class 12 from a recognised board with relevant subjects. The selection criteria may vary slightly depending on several parameters. Students are selected based on either entrance scores or merit (as per the institute's guidelines). Students must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects in Class 12. The required subjects set also vary depending on the specialisations.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for R.R. Group of Institutions BTech?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you may get admission at R.R Group of Institutions with 85%ile in the qualifying exam. However, the institute considers several parameters while shortlisting the candidates. Hence, just securing 85 percentile in the qualifying exam may not guarantee you a seat at the institute. Students may have to either submit entrance exam scores or appear for the institute-level exam. For detailed eligibility criteria and admission chances, students can fill out the admission form available at the official website.

review_content.Placements: I am studying at R.R. Group of Institutions. In this college, I have seen very much placement opportunities. I recommend all students to come and join the campus approximately. All students of my 3rd year batch are placed, and we will get our placements in our final year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Very good infrastructure this college has. Here, I experienced a very good environment for students for residential and educational purposes. review_content.Placements: 85% students are placed, showing high demand. Our skills are valued by the industry. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, and the average is 7.2 LPA. Practical experience boosted our careers. Popular Roles are Software and Analyst roles offered widely. Our course offers a diverse path.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our course, great Wi-Fi, modern labs, good classrooms, and a full library are available. Excellent learning support. Hostel has comfy rooms, tasty food, medical help, fun sports, and a healthy student life.

content.Placements: In our college, core branch students get more than 90% placement, while non-core branches achieve 80%+ placement. content.Infrastructure: In our college, the campus is fully Wi-Fi accessible. The labs, classrooms, and the college library all have full Wi-Fi access. In fact, our classrooms are generally cooled below 25 degrees Celsius. The condition of the hostel is also very good, and the food quality is good as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College facilities are good.

content.Placements: In my college from mechanical, civil, and electrical branches, 100% students are placed in good companies. In CSE branch of core programming-based work, 80% students are placed. From the biotechnology branch, some students are placed in the medical line, and they are doing well in their jobs. My course mechanical branch is very good. In this branch, 100% placement is available in our college for GATE oriented purposes.
content.Faculty: Teaching quality is very good, even for some subjects like mechanics and engineering. Physics teachers are from IITs so they are very knowledgeable in their subjects. They teach students according to the latest education pattern of AKTU and affiliated university. This college is very good. You can even clear competitive exams like GATE mechanical and GATE civil from this college. In one word, education is very good at the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best college in budget for better career options.

content.Placements: Best placement rate. Students got placed in core companies after the end of 6th semester and just from the 7th semester the students are invited for campus drives. Core companies come for campus drives. Students got placed in the best core companies for better jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Now we will talk about infrastructure so basically, infrastructure is good we can say but there can be better options for improvement regarding infrastructure. About college hostel food quality is good. Rooms are also good and 2 students per room. Also, gym facility is available at the college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Top class institute of Lucknow.

content.Placements: I am studying at R.R. Group of Institutions. In this college, I have seen very much placement opportunities. I recommend all students to come and join the campus approximately. All students of my 3rd year batch are placed, and we will get our placements in our final year.
content.Infrastructure: Very good infrastructure this college has. Here, I experienced a very good environment for students for residential and educational purposes. I have watched some other colleges but I selected this college due to the best infrastructure. College has library, workshop, and many more.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent college experience.

content.Placements: 85% students are placed, showing high demand. Our skills are valued by the industry. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, and the average is 7.2 LPA. Good financial returns on our education. Key Recruiters are TCS, Infosys, and Wipro, who actively hire. Leading firms trust our graduates. 60% got internships in good companies. Practical experience boosted our careers. Popular Roles are Software and Analyst roles offered widely. Our course offers a diverse path.
content.Infrastructure: In our course, great Wi-Fi, modern labs, good classrooms, and a full library are available. Excellent learning support. Hostel has comfy rooms, tasty food, medical help, fun sports, and a healthy student life.

admission_overview.college_name: R.R. Group of Institutions Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Fees, Application

admission_process.title: R.R. Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: R.R. Group of Institutions admission 2025is a blend of merit and entrance-based. Students seeking to join the institute need to meet the eligibility criteria of the desired course. The institute offers courses in several fields, such as Management, Technology, etc. Students can pursue a variety of courses, such as MBA, BTech, and more. Candidates are shortlisted either on the basis of a valid score obtained in national-level entrance tests or academic merit as per the criteria of the course. The BTech and MBA courses are affiliated withAKTU& approved by AICTE, whereas, Polytechnic courses are offered in affiliation to BTE. Interested students can read the following article to learn all about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process forR.R. Group of Institutions.

R.R. Group of Institutions' course admissionis made on the basis of preset admission criteria. Students seeking to join the UG courses need to pass Class 12 in a relevant stream, similarly, PG admissions require students must have completed graduation. In addition to clearing the eligibility, students must also complete the selection criteria. Interested students can check out the following table to learn about the eligibility and selection criteria for some of theR.R. Group of Institutions courses:

The admission procedure for R.R. Group of Institutions involves application, shortlisting, and admission confirmation. Those who are seeking to get into the institute need to ensure that they meet the admission criteria beforehand. Students need to complete the entire process to get into the institute. Find below the steps for theR.R. Group of Institutions admission process:
Step 1: Check the Eligibility

The first step in the procedure requires students to check the admission criteria of the desired programme. The table above mentions the eligibility for some of the top courses offered at the institute. Candidates may visit the website for more details.
Step 2: Application Process
Apply online at the official website of the institute and fill out the application form available by providing the required details.
Step 3: Selection Process

Students are shortlisted based on several parameters. Students need to either provide valid entrance exam scores, such as JEE/ CUET, etc., or appear for the institute-level entrance test. Alternatively, students may get direct admission provided they satisfy the prerequisite.
Step 4: Admission Confirmation
Selected students need to pay the admissionR.R. Group of Institutions feefor seat confirmation.
Download RRGI Brochure

hostel_campus.college_name: R.R. Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostel is well equipped with a common hall with television, and indoor games such as table tennis, chess, Carrom Board etc, the rooms in the hostel are spacious well lit, and well ventilated a dining area with mess facilities for breakfast, lunch and dinner, pay phone facility, water cooler with RO system and water geyser, Internet, 24 hours power supply, water and security is on the priority and available in the hostel.

library.description: The library of RRIMT, Lucknow at present has total collection of around 36,822 books with approx. 5,740 numbers of titles. Apart from this, there is also a significant collection of 150 journals (national and international). More than 300 online journals are also available for students. Magazines and non-print materials include 300 CDs, etc. Books are basically organized by the Dewey Decimal Classification (DDC) scheme, and cataloguing is based on AACR II, We have also membership of DELNET which covers online libraries of the world more than 2100 libraries including 22 foreign libraries facilitating 24/7 online access.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure
reviews.review_text: In our college, the campus is fully Wi-Fi accessible. The labs, classrooms, and the college library all have full Wi-Fi access. In fact, our classrooms are generally cooled below 25 degrees Celsius. The condition of the hostel is also very good, and the food quality is good as well.

reviews.review_heading: College facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: In my college from mechanical, civil, and electrical branches, 100% students are placed in good companies. In CSE branch of core programming-based work, 80% students are placed. From the biotechnology branch, some students are placed in the medical line, and they are doing well in their jobs. My course mechanical branch is very good. In this branch, 100% placement is available in our college for GATE oriented purposes.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in budget for better career options.
reviews.review_text: Now we will talk about infrastructure so basically, infrastructure is good we can say but there can be better options for improvement regarding infrastructure. About college hostel food quality is good. Rooms are also good and 2 students per room. Also, gym facility is available at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Top class institute of Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure this college has. Here, I experienced a very good environment for students for residential and educational purposes. I have watched some other colleges but I selected this college due to the best infrastructure. College has library, workshop, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college experience.
reviews.review_text: In our course, great Wi-Fi, modern labs, good classrooms, and a full library are available. Excellent learning support. Hostel has comfy rooms, tasty food, medical help, fun sports, and a healthy student life.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers a world of opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well and good. It has Wi-Fi-enabled labs, smart classrooms, and a library. Wi-Fi is available across the campus. The fee of the hostel is also less, around Rs. 60,000 per year. The quality of the food is good. Sports equipment is allotted by the college itself. There is a gym facility in the hostel with a minimum charge of Rs. 500 per month.

reviews.review_heading: It has placements, skilled teachers, an industry-relevant curriculum, and good internships.
reviews.review_text: The department offers high-speed Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms, and a vast library. Hostels are clean with secure rooms. The mess provides hygienic and nutritious food. The canteen offers diverse options. Medical aid and sports facilities are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is good as they are focused on studies and extracurriculars too.
reviews.review_text: Every facility is available. In elaborated form, I can say that all the books related to the courses and streams are available in the in-house library. A good hostel facility in which the students get a proper food as breakfast, lunch, bunch, tea at evening with some snacks and dinner.

reviews.review_heading: Yes, good placement in 2015 and better in 2024 in my college.
reviews.review_text: My college has very good facilities. For example, Wi-Fi works, and the labs are very good. The teachers in my college are very good. Classrooms are cleaned every day. The library is available in my college, along with other facilities. The quality of facilities in my hostel is very good, and the food is healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements, industry-focused curriculum, supportive faculty, but needs more industry ties.
reviews.review_text: The department offers high speed Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms and vast library. Hostels are clean with secure rooms. The mess does not provide hygienic, nutritious food, and the canteen does not offer diverse options. Medical aid and sports facilities are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in terms of studies and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. We have air-conditioned classrooms. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The library, hostel, and the food quality of the hostel are good. Medical facilities are provided. The hostel has a neat environment for students. There is a gym and strong security evergreen environment.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with my college because of poor faculty and the system and atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: There were labs that provide practical training about the course. There is a library with a huge collection of books. The food quality was good, with hygiene and cleanliness being maintained. Sports and games were average. There is proper guidance from the warden.

reviews.review_heading: It is rigorous and disciplined; if I have to say, it is too strict. I am slightly dissatisfied .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course is fundamental; the labs are available for the students, but the library does not contain a wide variety of books for the courses. The quality of food in the hostel is garbage. There are a lot of students from the hostel who don't even want to eat college food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very strict, and it is more like school than college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working well. Our classrooms are average. The food quality is not good. The oil quality is not good. It causes the throat to soar. There is only a single event for sports. They only want students to study while there will be no possibility for growth of other things.

reviews.review_heading: Here is the detailed review of RR Institute of Modern Technology.
reviews.review_text: There are all the facilities available for the betterment of students as well as to enhance the environment of learning on the campus. All the classes are air-conditioned. Every floor has separate water coolers and washrooms for boys and girls. There are 6 computer labs, with each lab containing 70 systems.

data.description: R.R. Group of Institutions is a well supported campus with facilities like air-conditioned classrooms, auditorium, hostels, cafeteria, design studio, gym, labs, library, shuttle service, sports complex and wi-fi campus, among others.

paragraphs: R.R Group of Institutions offers scholarships to students on the following basis:
i) Top 10 students will get a scholarships of 50% on total tuition fees.
ii) Next 30 students will get a scholarship of 30% on total tuition fees.
iii) Next 50 students will get a scholarship of 10% on total tuition fees.
No, R.R. group of institutions does not charge any application fee for B.Tech or any other course.

The annual fee for a two-year MBA at RR Group of Institutions is 89,700 INR for the first year and 84,200 INR for the second year. RR Group of Institutions offers various specializations in MBA eg: Finance, Information Technology, Marketing, etc. It can be a bit expensive for some students. Students can also avail scholarships by taking part in the Scholarship test conducted by the college itself.

Watch out this space for the latest news around BITS Pilani - WILP Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

faqs.answer: A:    BITS Pilani WILP does not require traditional entrance exam scores like GATE for admission to its M.Tech. programs. Instead, the admission process is based on the following criteria:Educational Qualification: A B.E./B.Tech. degree with at least 60% marks in the relevant field of study.Work Experience: Candidates should have a minimum of one year of relevant work experience in engineering, IT, or related sectors.Current Employment: Applicants must be employed at the time of application.There is no need for specific entrance exams like GATE, GRE, or others for the WILP M.Tech. programs. Instead, your academic background and professional experience are the key selection criteria.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by BITS Pilani WILP for admission M.Tech.?

faqs.answer: A:    Hi,BITS Pilani Online MBA Application Process:To start the application process you need to visit the official portal of the university and register yourself by entering your email ID and contact number.Application fees at BITS Pilani WILP can be paid online via debit card, credit card, or net banking. The amount charged of INR 1,500 is non-refundable in nature and is mandatory to pay at the time of applying.Thanks
faqs.question: What is the application fee for the MBA program at BITS Pilani WILP?

review_content.Placements: Usually most of the students get the placement, but we have some other schemes as well, like providing funds to the students who come with some business ideas and also supporting them with attendance, degrees, and relaxation in exams if they generate good revenue.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our course has sufficient infrastructure, which means they have the best lab equipment, equipped with all the modern tools, air-conditioned classes, and a library. Hostels are also good caretakers and support us in positive activities. It's a ragging-free environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Engineering Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Engineers Talents Factory.

review_content.Placements: Around 90-95% of students get placed. The highest package last year was INR. 60 LPA. The lowest was INR 22 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Amazon, Infosys, and many tech companies are there. HCL and Wipro are currently providing the internship. Many responsibilities are given to the students so that they can also develop leadership skills. Every then and now new projects are assigned to keep the interest alive.
review_content.Infrastructure: Actually, I chose an online programme so most of the time the classes were online. The online faculty really amazing. The professors have extraordinary skills to bring interest in the topics that they teach. I have been in the contact with the students who take offline classes they share their experiences always keeping smiles on their faces. I have never known such a college where a minimal number of assignments are there but the practical knowledge is at the fullest.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Engineering Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: BITS Pilani is a great place to learn and grow.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered is about 60 LPA, the average salary package offered is 30 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 15 LPA - 20 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, Amazon, and Facebook. Our college has 100% placement record. The role offered in our course is software engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is average. Wi-Fi, a library, and all the required things are available in the hostel, but the quality is not so good. The quality of food is average. Medical facilities are available 24x7. A variety of sports like swimming, cricket, football, etc., are available in BITS Pilani.

faqs.answer: BITS Pilani - WILP has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityPG DiplomaEmployed professionals who hold M.Sc. (Electronics) are also eligible to applyM.E./M.TechEmployed professionals holding M.Sc, MCA or equivalent in relevant disciplines with at least 60% aggregate marks and minimum one year of work experience in relevant domains.MBA/PGDMEmployed professionals holding M.Sc or its equivalent with at least 60% aggregate marks, and minimum one year relevant work experience are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechWorking professionals holding Diploma in Engineering/ B.Sc. in relevant disciplines, with at least 60% aggregate marks and minimum of two years of work experience in relevant domains. The programme is designed for: Highly driven and ambitious engineers who wish to gain deep insight into Core Engineering, Manufacturing and Executive Management functions Experienced professionals aspiring to gain an overall competency in the popular technology domains, which sets them apart from narrow specialiszationsM.Sc.Working professionals holding M.Sc./ MCA/ MBA or equivalent are eligible to apply.

review_summary.college_name: Work Integrated Learning Programmes Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computing Systems and Infrastructure - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of BITS Pilani - WILP.

content.Placements: The placement of college has improved within the year. Almost all of us got placed in good companies with decent packages. I would say there are unlimited opportunities for placement and internships. If you are a good, hardworking candidate, it is very easy to crack. The average package for our course is 7 LPA. The top recruiters are Google and Citi Bank.
content.Infrastructure: The campus life is vibrant; we have 3 fests per year. Here, people come from different states, making it a very diverse campus. We have physical and digital libraries with passcodes given to every student. In the hostel, non-AC rooms are provided with basic facilities like fan, light, and WLAN connection. The food is average here; they prepare it in North Indian style, which West and South people may not like.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Engineering Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I'm absolutely satisfied with the money I'm spending here for my education.

content.Placements: Usually most of the students get the placement, but we have some other schemes as well, like providing funds to the students who come with some business ideas and also supporting them with attendance, degrees, and relaxation in exams if they generate good revenue.
content.Infrastructure: Our course has sufficient infrastructure, which means they have the best lab equipment, equipped with all the modern tools, air-conditioned classes, and a library. Hostels are also good caretakers and support us in positive activities. It's a ragging-free environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Engineering Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Engineers Talents Factory.

content.Placements: Around 90-95% of students get placed. The highest package last year was INR. 60 LPA. The lowest was INR 22 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Amazon, Infosys, and many tech companies are there. HCL and Wipro are currently providing the internship. Many responsibilities are given to the students so that they can also develop leadership skills. Every then and now new projects are assigned to keep the interest alive.
content.Infrastructure: Actually, I chose an online programme so most of the time the classes were online. The online faculty really amazing. The professors have extraordinary skills to bring interest in the topics that they teach. I have been in the contact with the students who take offline classes they share their experiences always keeping smiles on their faces. I have never known such a college where a minimal number of assignments are there but the practical knowledge is at the fullest.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Engineering Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: BITS Pilani is a great place to learn and grow.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered is about 60 LPA, the average salary package offered is 30 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 15 LPA - 20 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, Amazon, and Facebook. Our college has 100% placement record. The role offered in our course is software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is average. Wi-Fi, a library, and all the required things are available in the hostel, but the quality is not so good. The quality of food is average. Medical facilities are available 24x7. A variety of sports like swimming, cricket, football, etc., are available in BITS Pilani.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Engineering Technology - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Best for placements and good for learning something new practically.

content.Placements: On campus placements and pre placement offers are the two modes on can get placed at Bits Pilani. On campus placements are highly competitive and stress driven as a lot of good tier 1, 2 companies come and the packages provided by them is also very good. Since it's highly competitive the entire season is for one whole semester and each student is allowed to choose in which sem they want to sit for placement and in which sem they want to opt for Intern in which PPO is given to majorly student.
content.Infrastructure: The greenery filled campus is also having faculty quarters at further distance from A hostels and also A big Guest house on C side. The auditorium is big with accommodation of 2400 peoples. Its completely air conditioned. A lot of labs and other rooms and a Workshop are there with all organised stuff. A well managed Medical center with sufficient facilities. It has a lot more features you can only experience. Its spread over around 190 acres which is sufficient for 2400 students.

The flagship programmes offered at SNDT Women's University include MSc, BEd, MBA, PG Diploma and MA among others. The seat intake for MSc and MA programmes at SNDT Women University Pune is 145 and 130, respectively.

Companies like TCS and Wipro visit the campus for placements. The average package offered is 2-3 LPA. reviews_list.review_title: Very good teaching quality.

review_content.Placements: There are no placement facilities, and no company comes for the recruitment. We have to do an internship for our final year, and we all got internships in very reputed companies and boutiques, which gave us a very good experience. We were mostly offered jobs in the textile industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of SNDT College is very good. Wi-Fi, a well-equipped laboratory, a classroom with a good atmosphere, a very good library, and good washrooms and toilets are there. Hostel facilities are very good, and the quality is also good. Medical facilities are also provided.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: The teaching quality and learning experience here are good.

review_content.Placements: The average package offered for my course was Rs 3 LPA. The highest package was 5 LPA. The top recruiters are hospitals and private clinics. Almost 70% of the batch opted for internships during the second year. Almost 60 to 70% of students get placed on campus. The campus placement cell is handled by the students and is very active.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is wonderful, and the classrooms are good with projectors. The college environment is good for sports activities. There is also a first-aid kit available. The canteen is well maintained. The library also has an updated collection of books.

review_summary.college_name: SNDT Women's University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nutrition & Dietetics - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: SNDT College of home science.

content.Placements: This college does not provide placements at all. It provides internships but not placements. There are many courses in this college, and as per the course, the fee for aided courses fees is less, and for unaided courses, it is more. The admission is done based on marks and caste.
content.Infrastructure: My course is in Nutrition and Dietetics, and it is an interesting course. Our college has a very big campus, and the only hostel is there. We have a library, and it's too big and can get any type of book there. The college also has a gym, and classrooms are also big.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure.

content.Placements: SNDT College provides placement opportunities to B.Com students. Around 30% of the students get placed in our college. Average package offered in the college was between 2-3 LPA. Top recruiting companies were HDFC, Bajaj Finance, Finastra, Hitachi, etc. Top roles offered were in accounts, technical support, sales, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure is available for the B.Com course at SNDT college. Facilities offered in our college were of good quality. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, mess etc. were available for the students. Mess and canteen food was good to eat. Multiple sports facilities were available for the students.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (May 2022)-B.Sc. in Textile Science - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Very good teaching quality.

content.Placements: There are no placement facilities, and no company comes for the recruitment. We have to do an internship for our final year, and we all got internships in very reputed companies and boutiques, which gave us a very good experience. We were mostly offered jobs in the textile industry.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of SNDT College is very good. Wi-Fi, a well-equipped laboratory, a classroom with a good atmosphere, a very good library, and good washrooms and toilets are there. Hostel facilities are very good, and the quality is also good. Medical facilities are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The teaching quality and learning experience here are good.

content.Placements: The average package offered for my course was Rs 3 LPA. The highest package was 5 LPA. The top recruiters are hospitals and private clinics. Almost 70% of the batch opted for internships during the second year. Almost 60 to 70% of students get placed on campus. The campus placement cell is handled by the students and is very active.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is wonderful, and the classrooms are good with projectors. The college environment is good for sports activities. There is also a first-aid kit available. The canteen is well maintained. The library also has an updated collection of books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Textile Science and Fashion Apparel Design - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college was very good. I love my college.

content.Placements: More than 50% of students got placed from our college. Top roles offered in my course included apparel designer, textile engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and the library were the best and clean. There was no canteen in the college. Medical facilities were also good. The hostel was very safe and clean, the food was nice, and the Wi-Fi connection was very fast. My college always participated in various types of sports and games at the national level. The college was very peaceful and beautiful, with lots of greenery.

admission_overview.college_name: SNDT Women's University Admissions 2025: Fee, Selection Criteria, Eligibility

paragraphs: SNDT Women's University admissionis a mix of both merit and entrance-based. The university provides an extensive range of programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral and diploma levels. These courses are offered in the fields of Technology, Education, Arts, Science, Computer Science, and more.SNDT Women's Universityadmission and application process commences online. The university offers courses in full-time and part-time (classroom) mode over 15 courses. Some of the popular programmes of SNDT Women's University are MSc, BEd, MBA, PG Diploma, and MA among others. The university accepts a valid score from several national and state-level entrance exams to shortlist the students. Interested students can read the following article to know about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and more for the university.

SNDT Pune course admissionis subject to fulfilment of the course-specific admission criteria. A student (from SNDT Pune or any other University) cannot get readmission into the BA second or BA third year after four years of break. This applies to all courses which belong to the Faculty of Humanities, Commerce and Management, Interdisciplinary Studies, Science and Technology. The table below showcases the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularSNDT Women's University courses:
Admission Test + Personal Interview
MSc in Nutrition and Health Communication-
The admission process will consist of a personal interview on the dates that will be communicated over email.

SNDT Women’s University feeincludes multiple components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Once selected, candidates are required to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university. The fee may vary depending on the programme and specialisation selected by the students. Interested candidates can look at the following table to know about the course-wiseSNDT Women's University fees:
This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

SNDT Women’s University seat intake variescourse-wise. The university offers a limited number of seats for its prorgammes. For getting a seat at the university, candidates are required need to meet the last educational qualification. Find below SNDT Pune seat intake for top courses:
This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

SNDT Pune admission processincludes registration, selection and admission confirmation. Candidates must meet the admission criteria as specified by the university's guidelines to be eligible for admission at the university. Interested students can follow the below steps to get a seat atSNDT University Pune:
STEP 1: SNDT Women's University Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the university.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
SNDT Pune shortlists candidates based on merit. However, the university also conducts Personal Interviews for MVA courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the university releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted seats in the university. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat at the university.

placement_report.college_name: SNDT Women's University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: SNDT Women's University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to SNDT Women's University NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 1.61 LPA , INR 4.5 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 1-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 2.7 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, according to the NIRF report 2023, 335 UG and 328 PG students were placed during SNDT Women's University placements in 2022. The median package offered to UG students ranges between INR 1.2 LPA and INR 6 LPA. Further, the median package offered to PG students ranges between INR 4.32 LPA and INR 5 LPA.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Shreemati Nathibai Damodar Thackersey Women's University, Churchgate- Pune?
faqs.answer: Almost 40-50% of MBA students get on-campus placements at Shreemati Nathibai Damodar Thackersey Women’s University (SNDTWU), Churchgate Campus, Mumbai. Companies like TCS and Wipro visit the campus for placements. The average package offered is 2-3 LPA. SNDTWU also has a placement cell that provides training and placement opportunities to students The median placement rate for undergraduate (UG) students in 2022 was 66%, and the median placement rate for postgraduate (PG) students was 85%, with UG students receiving a median package of INR 5,40 LPA and PG students receiving packages of INR 4,32 LPA.

faqs.question: Who were the recruiters at the Shreemati Nathibai Damodar Thackersey Women's University, Churchgate- Pune placements 2023?
faqs.answer: Industrial Psychology students work in Indian conglomerate / multinational corporation / renowned organisation where they work with HR professionals and Industry professionals and learn and contribute to different management projects. Students gain management and psychometric skills required in organizations. Learn to understand organizational and employee dynamics, learning and leadership styles, etc. TCS and Wipro visit the campus for placements

hostel_campus.college_name: SNDT Women's University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: SNDT College of home science.
reviews.review_text: My course is in Nutrition and Dietetics, and it is an interesting course. Our college has a very big campus, and the only hostel is there. We have a library, and it's too big and can get any type of book there. The college also has a gym, and classrooms are also big.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure is available for the B.Com course at SNDT college. Facilities offered in our college were of good quality. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, mess etc. were available for the students. Mess and canteen food was good to eat. Multiple sports facilities were available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Very good teaching quality.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of SNDT College is very good. Wi-Fi, a well-equipped laboratory, a classroom with a good atmosphere, a very good library, and good washrooms and toilets are there.
Hostel facilities are very good, and the quality is also good.
Medical facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: The teaching quality and learning experience here are good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is wonderful, and the classrooms are good with projectors. The college environment is good for sports activities. There is also a first-aid kit available. The canteen is well maintained. The library also has an updated collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: The college was very good. I love my college.
reviews.review_text: Labs and the library were the best and clean. There was no canteen in the college. Medical facilities were also good. The hostel was very safe and clean, the food was nice, and the Wi-Fi connection was very fast. My college always participated in various types of sports and games at the national level. The college was very peaceful and beautiful, with lots of greenery.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by S.N.D.T. College of EducationReviewed on 7 Feb 2022)
reviews.review_heading: This college is a better option.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities available like high-speed internet Wi-Fi, clean and hygienic labs, classrooms, a library and a laboratory. Sports facilities and grounds are available. Canteen, digital study material, good quality food and medical facilities are available in this college as well.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SNDT Women's University, Pune.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good infrastructure, 2 libraries, good and fast Wi-Fi, 2 canteens and also medical facilities. Hostels were not good, and the quality of food was not that good. Sports and games like badminton, volleyball, girls' football, etc., were provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SNDT Mumbai College.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for my course include Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, and labs. The quality of the food is not as good compared to other colleges, but the medical facility is nice. We also have sports and games facilities, with monthly and weekly tournaments for students who want to play.

review_summary.college_name: Kanya Maha Vidyalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My best part of my life started in college.

content.Placements: In the M.A. Psychology course at KMV, placements depend a lot on individual skills and interest areas. While core psychology roles may not provide mass placements like technical fields. Many students did get opportunities in counseling, teaching, or internships at mental health centers. A few also prepared for competitive exams or went for higher studies like M.Phil or Ph.D. Internships were usually available in hospitals, NGOs, or with psychologists, which helped in building practical knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of KMV was quite good. Classrooms were well-organized and had a calm atmosphere for studying. Campus had strong Wi-Fi connectivity. The library was peaceful with a wide collection of psychology books and research materials. The environment was clean and disciplined. The mess food was vegetarian but hygienic and better than many other colleges. College also provided a safe and comfortable space for female students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good and affordable.

content.Placements: I did not know much about placement or internships. Maybe it will be good. The college should be supportive of students and teachers should also guide them. I did not know much about it. I have very little knowledge about placements and internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the biotech department is very good. There are well-maintained labs and the equipment is also good enough. The classroom and library are well decorated and maintained. Overall, we can say it is very valuable and good. All other facilities are provided on campus.

content.Infrastructure: Modern labs with many equipments like spectrophotometer, laminar air flow, autoclave, centrifuge is present in the department. A departmental library continuing many reference and costly books and smart classrooms with projector are present in the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: KMV is the best with good infrastructure and good faculty.

content.Placements: Around 75% students are placed with around 2-3 LPA package. Companies that visit here are Byjus, wipro, etc. Banks are hire students like kotak mahindra bank and central bank. The college provides internships to all students.

As per the India Today 2025, the institute ranked #71 under B.A. category, #72 under B.Com., #83 under B.Sc., #42 under BCA, and #35 under Fashion Design. Kanya Maha Vidyalaya excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. outlook.description:
Kanya Maha Vidyalaya has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by Outlook-ICARE 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Arts' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Kanya Maha Vidyalaya's rank is #71, the same as last year's rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has shown stability in trend in the 'Fashion Design (Private)' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Kanya Maha Vidyalaya's rank is #23, the same as last year's rank in the 'Fashion Design (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
In the 'Mass Communication (Private)' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Kanya Maha Vidyalaya's rank is #33, the same as last year's rank in the 'Mass Communication (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Kanya Maha Vidyalaya Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Founded in I886, KMV boarding house, ‘Kanya Ashram’, as it was popularly called, is situated within the precincts of the college. The hostel building consists of four hostel wings- Savitri Bhawan, Rai Bahadur Badri Das Hostel, Saraswati Bhawan and New Hostel. Located in lush green and eco-friendly surroundings, the hostel has a provision of accommodation for about 800 girl students.
Furnished with state-of-the-art infrastructure, the Institution provides all modern amenities to the boarders such as water coolers, solar system, T.V, LCD Projector, newspapers. Spacious and airy rooms are fitted with a ceiling fan and a tube light each. In order to ensure pure, uncontaminated and uninterrupted water supply, filters and purifiers have been installed.

library.description: Fully digitized three storey Library with more than 100000 Books, Magazines and Journals.
Fully digitized three storey Library with more than 100000 Books, Magazines and Journals.

cafeteria.description: Hygienic mess with a spacious dining hall, attached with a modern kitchen equipped with latest gadgets, has an absolutely healthy environment. The food served is tasty nourishing, balanced and purely vegetarian. Rations and vegetables used are of exceptional quality. To maintain proper quality and hygienic conditions, food is inspected daily by the hostel authorities. Regular checks of water and kitchen hygiene are done personally by the Principal.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Science Labs, Food Science and Microbiology Labs, Accounting Labs, Forensic Labs, Home science Labs

reviews.review_heading: My best part of my life started in college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of KMV was quite good. Classrooms were well-organized and had a calm atmosphere for studying. Campus had strong Wi-Fi connectivity. The library was peaceful with a wide collection of psychology books and research materials. The environment was clean and disciplined. The mess food was vegetarian but hygienic and better than many other colleges. College also provided a safe and comfortable space for female students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good and affordable.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the biotech department is very good. There are well-maintained labs and the equipment is also good enough. The classroom and library are well decorated and maintained. Overall, we can say it is very valuable and good. All other facilities are provided on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and facilities are fine.
reviews.review_text: Modern labs with many equipments like spectrophotometer, laminar air flow, autoclave, centrifuge is present in the department. A departmental library continuing many reference and costly books and smart classrooms with projector are present in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Best autonomous heritage .
reviews.review_text: Our department provides a lot of knowledge about the theoretical as well as practical. They provide internship programs which are compulsory for the students. In the hostel, there is hygienic food as well as washrooms to use. There is home like environment in the college.

reviews.review_heading: KMV is the best with good infrastructure and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good and the college provides all the facilities to the students which are really beneficial for the students. Classrooms are very big and they are cleaned everyday. Library is very big with lots of books. Hostel is really good and food is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college building is good and attractive with a natural environment and greenery. It has a great space for parking both two-wheelers and four-wheelers. There is a separate space for sports, a canteen, a library, and an auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are very good and well-ventilated. They have air-conditioners, coolers, and attached washrooms. Common washrooms are cleaned properly. Labs are well-ventilated. Wi-Fi is available in all labs and hostel rooms. All the classrooms are well-ventilated.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of its teachers, good placements, good infrastructure, and hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are well ventilated. Labs and classrooms are digital. Wi-Fi is available in all classrooms and labs. Many sports are conducted at our college. We always win gold medals in almost all games. Recently, our college conducted a sports day.

reviews.review_heading: This college is worth it for admission.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and digital labs are very good. The atmosphere of our college is very peaceful. Studios of journalism and mass communication have equipment. The English department organises an English festival every year. The college also introduces Certificate courses, NCC camps etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am having a wonderful learning and life-changing experience here.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a lush green campus full of positivity. The service of Wi-Fi is provided. Matlab and practicals are given importance. The library is a rich source of books. Smart classrooms provide a good educational environment. Medical facilities are provided 24 by 7. The quality of food in canteen and mess is good. A lot of opportunities for students interested in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides excellent atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. We have other facilities like labs, animation labs, smart classrooms, and a department library. Good and healthy food is served in hostels. There is a special canteen for the hostel. Even the medical facilities provided are very good and are available 24 hours.

reviews.review_heading: Students in Kanya Maha Vidyalaya can learn with joy.
reviews.review_text: The ambience on the campus is great. Labs are air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is also available. The college has a library too, where you can find thousands of books. The college also has a huge auditorium, but as the students are in large number, now the auditorium needs to get enlarged so every student can get their space to sit. Rest of the things are great. You'll also find peacocks here.

reviews.review_heading: There are good infrastructure and best facilities in KMV college.
reviews.review_text: KMV college has very good facilities. There are many facilities like rooms, ground, mess, library, garden and knowledge gaining halls. The best part of our college is food facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Autonomous heritage institution to study.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus has most of neat and green environment. Our campus has great network of wi-fi. Each facility is provided to girls whether it is medical or other things. There special classes arranged for those who has interest in sports. Our college also win many prizes in sports category.

reviews.review_heading: Kanya Maha Vidyalaya is one of the best college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have smart classes and maths lab. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Medical facilities are provided 24x7. Our college is one of the best colleges in the sports field.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Kanya Maha Vidyalaya

likes.text: Many companies visit our college for placements, but among them, Concentric, Byju's, Lido Learning, Enexus Global, Wipro and Infosys are the best companies.
Our college provides various skill development courses, which allow students to get good placements.

college_info.intro: Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology offers courses at the UG, PG, Diploma, and Advanced Diploma levels. Admission to the respective courses is offered on the basis of merit. The Institute offers courses such as BSc, BA, and MSc as some of the popular programmes. Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology offers respective courses in affiliation with JNAFAU and Lincoln University College, Malaysia. The Institute also offers placement assistance through various collaborations and partnerships. For more details around Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology popular programmes, check out the table below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology offers courses such as BSc, MSc, BA, and MA in full-time mode for durations varying from 2 years to 4 years. The respective courses are offered on the basis of merit aggregate. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 for admission to UG-level courses. Whereas, for PG-level courses, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in graduation.

faqs.answer: A:    Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology offers courses at the UG and PG levels in full-time mode for the durations varying from 2 years to 4 years. The Institute offers the respective courses on the basis of merit and institute level entrance exams. Furthermore, the fee structure of the course includes tuition fees varying from INR 2.25 Lacs to INR 6 Lakh. Considering the placement facilities, course curriculum, and exposure the Institute offers, the fees structure is self explanatory. However, in comparison to other private institutes, Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology fees will lie under the category of expensive for some courses.

review_summary.college_name: Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Game Development - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology.

content.Placements: The class strength is still mediocre. If you want a good AME developer course, then there are better options. If you get into this college, I suggest not to depend or expect anything from the college. I haven't seen any senior who got good placements from this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not even close to what they advertise on their website. They don't have a library, gaming room, etc., which they wrote about on their website. Hostel food quality is average, and the quantity is also very low.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Game Development - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the future of gaming and game development in India.

content.Placements: Top roles offered are game developer, game level designer. game art and dynamics. Students are also offered virtual reality and augmented reality, web development, game programmer, game tester, and many more. You can freelance as students take an incurious interest in freelancing.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel has good infrastructure and I'm quite satisfied with the facilities available. Wi-Fi is available ( 100 Mbps ). Food served is decent, with non-vegetarian food available twice a week, and the hostel is within walkable distance from the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Game Development - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good college but no satisfaction with the infrastructure and facilities provided by them

content.Placements: Ubisoft, EA Sports, Roach Interactive, Sony, Google, Wipro Glu, Clemantis and some other companies visit and offer internships.for internships, the stipend will be 30,000 to 35,000 and for the job, it is 90,000 to 95,000. The salary also depends on your skills and company. It is easy when you complete your 2nd year to make games and show them to other companies and also, you can represent your game in the game development conference where there is a chance of winning. If you win in that, then automatically, you will be hired by many companies.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Game Art and Design - Batch of 2019

content.Other: I am pursuing B.F.A from the Backstage Pass Institute. The college has a really good environment for those who are interested in learning game design. The college has a good staff. There are many hostels nearby the college so it is convenient for the students coming from far away. Hope this information is helpful for the readers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Game Development - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 50% of the college is in the computer science field. About the packages, it's around 7 LPA minimum, and there is an international placement for I think 1 Crore. The top recruiting companies for my course would be Zynga and Ubisoft. I’d say it is more than 50%, and it is in companies like Zynga and Rockstar Games. The top role would be the Managing Director.
content.Infrastructure: The new place in HITEC City is really much better than the one in Madhapur. The college looks amazing from the outside, just like a software complex. Everything in the new place looks good, from the floors to the ceiling looks amazing, many restaurants nearby to much at. I am not from the hostel, but judging from the opinion of my friends its moderate, the rooms are big with many beds and together.

admission_process.title: Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology admission processcomprises mainly three rounds. It begins with an online application process, followed by the course fee payment as the final step of the admission process. Check the detailed steps forBackstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology admissions 2025:
Step 1: Application Process
Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology application process is conducted in online mode only. Students can apply by visiting the official website of the college.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology admissions are both merit-based and entrance-based. Students need to qualify for a college-level entrance exam to get admission to UG courses. However, for PG courses, direct admission is valid based on past academic merit.
Step 3: Counselling
After the completion of the selection rounds, students need to appear in online/ in-person counselling process. They also need to submit the relevant documents for verification.
Step 4: Final Admission
At last, the selected students must pay the semester fee to confirm their seats.

faqs.question: Will I get a refund if I wishdraw my admission from Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology BSc course?
faqs.answer: Yes, a student who wishes to withdraw admission from the Backstage Pass Institute of Gaming and Technology BSc course is entitled to a fee refund. However, refunds are only processed when the refund request is raised two working days (48 hours) prior to the official start date. No refund is initiated if the cancellation is requested after this timeframe or if the student fails to attend the programme.Moreover, as per the official website, the institute reserves the right to cancel or reschedule any course or programme due to unforeseen circumstances, such as insufficient enrolment or instructor availability. In the event of a cancellation, students will receive a full refund within 10 working days.

For final admission, candidates must pay the fees and confirm the seat.
