reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is the worst college in terms of placements and teaching.

review_content.Placements: Students were placed on the basis of state entrance and UCEED exam. Teachers here are not experienced enough and don't know how to teach. Placements are the worst here. Not even a single student got placed from here until now from B.Des. The salary offered was Rs. 14,000 per month, which is not good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a canteen which is never opened. Classrooms are like common rooms, and Wi-Fi is available only for administration. Our college doesn't have a hostel, and we need to opt for a rental room or stay in PG. We don't have a hostel life and no friends. There are no books to study. Teachers teach on their own.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of faculty members and support provided by them.

review_content.Placements: The college is new and a part of AKTU Lucknow. The 1st batch of the college will complete the course in the year 2021, so no placements are done till now. But the percentage of students who got an internship in this course is quite good. Almost every student got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is well-set-up with a good environment. The campus has a good number of facilities including Wi-Fi, well-set-up labs, canteen and well-set-up library. The workshop is equipped with CNC and laser cutter. There is a separate space for metal and wood workshop.

review_summary.college_name: U.P. Institute of Design Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College is average but it depends on students how they give their best for the degree.

content.Placements: In our college, 6 students got placement out of 15 students, the previous year. The highest salary package offered was 8.5 LPA and the lowest was 5.5 LPA. The top recruiting company is Just Dial. We have to find an internship by ourselves. Top roles of graphic designing and Ux/Ui designing are taught in this degree.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available on campus which includes Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality is also the best of everything and the best thing I like is the books in library. There are no hostels on campus but there is a hostel near the campus which is a government women's hostel and the facilities over there are best for girls.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of U.P. Institute of Design.

content.Placements: 5 students from the batch got placed (that I know of). The highest package was 8 LPA, and the lowest package was 3.5 LPA. Only two companies visited our college for campus placements. Approximately all the students got internships from my course.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available but doesn't work, and we have no access to it. The classrooms do not have AC. There is no hostel, mess or canteen. Sports and games are not available. Medical facilities are available on the campus, but only first-aid facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the worst college in terms of placements and teaching.

content.Placements: Students were placed on the basis of state entrance and UCEED exam. Teachers here are not experienced enough and don't know how to teach. Placements are the worst here. Not even a single student got placed from here until now from B.Des. The salary offered was Rs. 14,000 per month, which is not good.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a canteen which is never opened. Classrooms are like common rooms, and Wi-Fi is available only for administration. Our college doesn't have a hostel, and we need to opt for a rental room or stay in PG. We don't have a hostel life and no friends. There are no books to study. Teachers teach on their own.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of faculty members and support provided by them.

content.Placements: The college is new and a part of AKTU Lucknow. The 1st batch of the college will complete the course in the year 2021, so no placements are done till now. But the percentage of students who got an internship in this course is quite good. Almost every student got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: The college is well-set-up with a good environment. The campus has a good number of facilities including Wi-Fi, well-set-up labs, canteen and well-set-up library. The workshop is equipped with CNC and laser cutter. There is a separate space for metal and wood workshop.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It provides new opportunities for industrial design with workshops and laboratories.

content.Placements: Firstly it is a new and first design government. College falls under UPSEE, and the first batch has been placed successfully in companies like DFI, Delhi, Geeky ants, Fisdom, and many went to start their business and some went for further studies. Internships are being offered by faculty members and guided by HOD.
content.Infrastructure: UG, PG, and computer laboratories with workshops and 3D printing and optical scanner-like instruments. The laboratory has mac and graphic tablets for students to work on. Photography laboratory for the interested students. The hostel facility is not provided. But nearby there is a private hostel for girls and boys both.

faqs.answer: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.

individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and really good infrastructure, but bad placement.

content.Placements: The colleges placement department is weak and the percentage of students that are getting placed is very low. There is no package offered by any company and there are no recruiting companies visiting. There is no internship provided. No roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in college are not that good; it's an average experience. There are good classrooms and the library is better but no Wi-Fi is provided by the campus. The college does not provide any hostel facilities; we have to search for external accommodation.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good facility and good college life but no placements.

content.Placements: There are no placements in our college but the average package expected is INR 15000–25000 as an intern. The recruiting companies are IT firms. There are no internships provided they have not visited our college; we have to find the internship companies. No roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in college are not that good; its like an average experience. There are good classrooms and libraries, and there is also good college life, but there is no Wi-Fi provided on campus. The college does not provide hostels; we have to search for accommodation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am slightly satisfied because of the faculty members.

content.Placements: It is one of the decent colleges under the University of Calicut. Our college does not provide an internship. Our college does not conduct interviews for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like a canteen, hostel, labs, libraries, Wi-Fi, etc. It has almost good facilities for students. The college campus is beautiful and attractive to students. I am very lucky to live there.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and really good infrastructure, but bad placement.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities in college are not that good; it's an average experience. There are good classrooms and the library is better but no Wi-Fi is provided by the campus.
The college does not provide any hostel facilities; we have to search for external accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: Good facility and good college life but no placements.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities in college are not that good; its like an average experience. There are good classrooms and libraries, and there is also good college life, but there is no Wi-Fi provided on campus.
The college does not provide hostels; we have to search for accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: I was not satisfied with placements in 2022, but our college had good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided few facilities. Wi-Fi was available in only one or two classrooms. Separate labs were available. A huge library was available. Hostel facilities were not available. A canteen was available, but the quality of the food in the canteen was not good. They served only tea and snacks.

reviews.review_heading: Our college life is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not good but adjustable. There is no Wi-Fi and digital classrooms available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am slightly satisfied because of the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like a canteen, hostel, labs, libraries, Wi-Fi, etc. It has almost good facilities for students. The college campus is beautiful and attractive to students. I am very lucky to live there.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students because it offers good placements.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available at our college. It is a huge, green campus. Wi-Fi is available. The canteen has many types of food at low prices. The quality of the food is also good.

reviews_list.review_title: The NorthCap University!

review_content.Placements: There are a lot of companies that come to our college every year for placement drives like TCS, Infosys, HCL, Deloitte, Tata, and Byju's. The average package ranges from 2.5 LPA to 6 LPA. About 50-60% of the students get campus placement with an average salary.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is well-equipped with Wi-Fi (we are given 2GB of Wi-Fi, which is kind of less). Our classes are fully air-conditioned with good seating from where the board is clearly visible. The food at the campus is also good with varieties available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Great Infrastructure and Facilities.

review_content.Placements: As we are first-year students, we don't know much about the placements, but from what we have heard from our seniors, they genuinely help us in getting our placements done with the right knowledge and provide guidance through each and every step. The top recruiter is Dell for now.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is amazing. It is equipped with all the things needed by a student. The library is updated with books, classrooms have smart boards, and Wi-Fi is provided to each and every student. The canteen is great, providing yummy snacks.

overview_faqs.question: Is NCU good for BTech?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, NCU is good for BTech. The School of Engineering and Technology under NCU offers a BTech programme. The course is offered in 7 specialisations namely Full Stack Development, Cybersecurity and Forensics, Cloud Computing, Data Science, Gaming, AR&VR, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning and Blockchain-based. NCU offers BTech courses in collaboration with AWS Academy, Google Cloud, Oracle Academy, Cisco Networking Academy, Nptel and IBM. The courses are offered as part of the curriculum giving students access to the course material from the academic partner and hands-on practical on their platform. NCU has a record of nearly 100% placements of BTech programmes in highly reputed firms like Deloitte, Ernst and Young, TCS, Fidelity etc.

overview_faqs.question: Is LLM available in NorthCap University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, LLM is available at NorthCap University. It is a PG-level course offered in full-time mode. The duration of this programme is one year. Students enrolled in it get to choose from various specialisations, including Corporate Law, Human Rights Law, and Intellectual Property Rights. Overall, students study different facets of Law.

review_summary.college_name: Northcap University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Analytics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Great college life with a good placement offer.

content.Placements: I must say a full batch of business analytics got placed by university and got an average package of 5 LPA. Almost all the students got a placement if they applied for it, but some students didn't apply for the placement. Our college offers multiple placements and internships in India and abroad, with multiple scholarships and global opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Great infrastructure with a full Wi-Fi campus and a big enough library with most of the books. Our campus has 3 cafes, one inside the building and two in the garden. Our college has a big ground on which students can play, sit, and roam around, and also the whole university is very clean.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Digital Marketing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The NorthCap University is a very good college for B.Tech. Also, it is good for management.

content.Placements: 85% of students were placed in my college. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Mitsubishi, and many more. For campus placements, college follows a mock interview if you pass the interview, you are eligible for placements and it depends on you.
content.Infrastructure: The NorthCap University is not that big, and it has around 10 acres of land. The overall infrastructure is good. Classrooms are fully equipped. The library has all the books that are recommended by the teacher. Hostel is also good. One thing I can say is that the food is good and cooked with hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security and Forensics) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The NorthCap University!

content.Placements: There are a lot of companies that come to our college every year for placement drives like TCS, Infosys, HCL, Deloitte, Tata, and Byju's. The average package ranges from 2.5 LPA to 6 LPA. About 50-60% of the students get campus placement with an average salary.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is well-equipped with Wi-Fi (we are given 2GB of Wi-Fi, which is kind of less). Our classes are fully air-conditioned with good seating from where the board is clearly visible. The food at the campus is also good with varieties available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Great Infrastructure and Facilities.

content.Placements: As we are first-year students, we don't know much about the placements, but from what we have heard from our seniors, they genuinely help us in getting our placements done with the right knowledge and provide guidance through each and every step. The top recruiter is Dell for now.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is amazing. It is equipped with all the things needed by a student. The library is updated with books, classrooms have smart boards, and Wi-Fi is provided to each and every student. The canteen is great, providing yummy snacks.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements. Good infrastructure.

content.Placements: They have a very low placement ratio. They show 70% placement, but in reality, out of 600 students, only 100 are eligible to sit for placements. They have terms and conditions like no active backlogs or no backlog till now, and the companies that come here for hiring are offering very low packages.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very decent. They don't have any hostel, but the infrastructure is good; they have Wi-Fi at every corner with decent speed. The library is also up to mark. I would say they have the best canteen, in my opinion. The area of the college is small, which is why it has low sports facilities, but it has good medical facilities.

admission_overview.college_name: Northcap University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Process, Date, Fee

paragraphs: NorthCap University admission 2025 is open for all courses. The university offers various courses at UG and PG levels. To be eligible for admission, candidates must apply and appear for the entrance exams accepted by the university, such as JEE Mai, CLAT, MAT, XAT, GATE and others. Further, for admission to some courses university offers merit-based admission. Candidates looking for admission toNorthCap Universitycan apply on the official website of the university. To know more about NorthCap University admission, course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process, go through the following sections:

NorthCap University offers entrance-based admission to UG and PG courses and merit-based admission to some courses i.e., MA. Candidates looking for admission to NorthCap University must fill out the basic eligibility criteria to get admission. To be eligible for admission to UG courses, the candidates are required to pass Class 12 from a recognised board and for PG courses, candidates must have an undergraduate degree. After filling out the eligibility criteria, candidates must apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university for admission. Want to know more about NorthCap University course eligibility selection criteria go through the detailed breakdown:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria

Check here for more details aboutNorthCap University courses:

NorthCap University admission process 2025 is ongoing on the official website of the university. The university accepts various entrance exam scores such as CUET, GATE, CLAT, JEE Main, MAT, XAT and others for admission to UG and PG courses. Further, for admission to some courses, the university offers merit-based admission. Check below the step-by-stepNorthCap Universityadmission process:
Step 1: NorthCap University Application Process 2025

NorthCap University carries online application on its official website. The eligible candidates are to apply online on the official website of the university. It is required that the eligible candidates must have completed the entrance exam formalities & must have qualified the eligibility criteria for their respective courses before applying to the university.
Step 2: NorthCap University Selection Process 2025

Admission to the courses is both merit and entrance-based. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to UG and PG courses. Further, for other courses, NorthCap University offers merit-based admission.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted in the selection round, they are required to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

courses_data.name: NorthCap University MTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The University offers four streams in several specialisations under MTech programme. The courses is offered in both full-time and part-time modes. 30 per cent of the seats are reserved for GATE qualified applicants. For the remaining 70 per cent seats, the selection criteria shall be based on merit i.e. 85 per cent weightage will be given to aggregate in the qualifying examination at the UG level, and 15 per cent is given weightage to the personal interview. Any unfilled seats from GATE applicants shall also be treated as unreserved. Candidates, who wish to apply for any of these streams, must satisfy the below-mentioned eligibility criteria: Qualifying exam:GATE Applicant must have obtained a minimum of 55% aggregate in aggregate or equivalent CGPA in BE/BTech in Computer Science and Engineering/ information/ Mt Technology/Computer Technology/Computer Science and Applications/Computing in Software/Computer Networking/ Electronics & Communication Engineering OrMCA Or MSc (Computer Science/IT/Electronics/Software Engineering/ Mathematics/ Statistics/ Physics) OrAny other relevant equivalent qualifying degree

faqs.question: Has CLAT 2025 application process begun?
faqs.answer: CLAT Application Process 2025 began on July 15, 2024. The last date to register for CLAT 2025 was October 22. Candidates could fill the CLAT 2025 application until October 22, 2024. Candidates were allowed to fill out a single CLAT 2025 application form for each participating NLU until the deadline. The official website to fill CLAT Application Form is consortiumofnlus.ac.in. Find out more about the application process for CLAT 2025 here.

paragraphs: The NorthCap University placement report 2025 has been out on the official website. The highest package offered stood at INR 28 LPA . The average package of the top 50% stood at INR 10.14 LPA . More than 250 recruiters took part during the placement drive. Major recruiters such as IBM, HCL and Oracle and many others took part during the NorthCap University placements 2025.
The placement cell at NorthCap University provides mentoring sessions, skill enhancement programs and career guidance for successful placements.

reviews.review_heading: Great college life with a good placement offer.
reviews.review_text: Great infrastructure with a full Wi-Fi campus and a big enough library with most of the books. Our campus has 3 cafes, one inside the building and two in the garden. Our college has a big ground on which students can play, sit, and roam around, and also the whole university is very clean.

reviews.review_heading: The NorthCap University is a very good college for B.Tech. Also, it is good for management.
reviews.review_text: The NorthCap University is not that big, and it has around 10 acres of land. The overall infrastructure is good. Classrooms are fully equipped. The library has all the books that are recommended by the teacher. Hostel is also good. One thing I can say is that the food is good and cooked with hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: The NorthCap University!
reviews.review_text: The college campus is well-equipped with Wi-Fi (we are given 2GB of Wi-Fi, which is kind of less). Our classes are fully air-conditioned with good seating from where the board is clearly visible. The food at the campus is also good with varieties available.

reviews.review_heading: Great Infrastructure and Facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is amazing. It is equipped with all the things needed by a student. The library is updated with books, classrooms have smart boards, and Wi-Fi is provided to each and every student. The canteen is great, providing yummy snacks.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements. Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very decent. They don't have any hostel, but the infrastructure is good; they have Wi-Fi at every corner with decent speed. The library is also up to mark. I would say they have the best canteen, in my opinion. The area of the college is small, which is why it has low sports facilities, but it has good medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure and Supportive Faculty. Worth a Try!
reviews.review_text: My university has air-conditioned classrooms, a library, a common room, an amphitheater, an auditorium, Wi-Fi facility, a Thought Lab, a Psychology Lab, cafes, a Maggi Point (NESCAFE outlet), and a sports room for indoor sports like chess, carrom, and table tennis. There are also basketball and badminton areas, multiple washrooms, and drinking water facilities on each floor.

reviews.review_heading: Review: The Northcap University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, with air-conditioned classrooms and a large library containing thousands of books. No hostels are available for boys; hostels are only available for girls, and there are limited seats in the hostels. Many games and sports are available, such as cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Choose the right college for you .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is way to good; they provide us with AC classes, perfect benches, comfortable smart boards and a perfect garden, which gets awarded for the best garden award almost most of the time. It also provides us with 2 cafes and 1 Nescafe, providing healthy food and junk food .

reviews.review_heading: Crowd is not good but the faculty is good. The campus is average but small, no hostel for boys.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms have projectors for better teaching and creative learning. The students use these projectors for delivering presentations too. The Library is good having adequate collection of books. But the Wi-Fi is not that good and only provides 2GB for each student daily, the downloading speed is very good but the browsing speed is slow. There is only a girls hostel which is located 1KM away from the campus and there is no boys hostel available. The food quality is good in the cafes. Medi...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is really good, but it is not good for the sports students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good but there are not a lot of things that should be covered in the facilities. The courses are good. They should also provide boys hostel facilities. They only have female hostel facilities. The hostel food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty and infrastructure with great placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities provided by the universities. Wi-Fi is fully available throughout the campus and labs, classrooms are fully air-conditioned and well-maintained. Libraries are also very clean and fully air-conditioned. The hostel facilities are also very good and the quality of food is also very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: The Northcap University- Gurgaon.
reviews.review_text: We do not have hostel facilities. Only a girls' hostel is available. Food quality is very average. Wi-Fi and canteen facilities are also available. The taste of food in the canteen is very nice, food tastes like homemade food. Hostel rooms are cleaned every day in the morning.

reviews.review_heading: Strong Industry Connections and Supportive Faculty at The NorthCap University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available and access was given to all. The library is large enough for a perfectly calm study environment. The classrooms are good, with centralized AC all over the campus. The ground is huge, and the cafe facilities are a bit tiring as they don't deal in cash but only with canteen cards.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the university.
reviews.review_text: Facilities include accommodation for both girls and boys, a health centre, a well-stocked library with both online and sprint resources, a gymnasium, a multipurpose sports ground, a cafeteria, auditorium and well-equipped laboratories. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in terms of infrastructure, safety, and facilities. Faculty are helpful and supportive.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are really nice and well maintained. I am a day scholar, but according to my friends who have told me about hostels, they are not inside the college; they are outside the college, and they are only for girls.

data.description: The NorthCap University offers hostel accommodation options to students so that they can settle in and begin to enjoy student life right from day one. The accommodation is separate for boys and girls with clean and hygienic dining facilities provided by the University. The rooms are well furnished with a 24-hour power backup, treated water, wi-fi, intercom, indoor sports, entertainment & recreational facilities and a bus between the hostel and the University for the convenience of the students. All hostels are provided with security guards around the clock. As the hostel run by the University has limited seats, those students who are unable to be accommodated can find alternative lodging nearby.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about The NorthCap University

likes.text: The big companies like IBM, Deloitte, FIDELITY, ICICI visit this university for hiring.
College provides internship on basis of academics as well as interview, Also stipend is give in some interns.

likes.text: The quality of facilities in the hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports and games are all good.
The college provides facilities like well-equipped library, labs, Wi-Fi with high-speed, spacious classrooms, and well-maintained washrooms.

likes.text: Faculty are well qualified and are passionate to teach, the course curriculum is up to date and easy to understand.
The course curriculum is good as it has all the subjects that might help for post graduation in future.

likes.text: Faculty and staff are well qualified, you actually get to learn a lot as a proper curriculum and calendar is followed for every activity.
Our university organised many social and cultural fests twice annually which used to be good rejuvenating activities for all the students.

Yes, NCU offers merit-based fee concessions cum scholarships of 100%, 50% or 25% of the Tuition Fee based on performance in XII boards or national levels entrance exams (JEE, CLAT ISAT etc. ). Or SAT or IB scores. Continuation of Admission Scholarship in subsequent academic years is subject to obtaining a CGPA of 8 on a scale of 10, having no backlog and no disciplinary case being recorded against the student. We also offer merit cum means scholarships for Haryana domicile students covering 100%, 50% and 25% of the Annual Fee.

As per the official information brochure, the total fee for BCom courses ranges from INR 1.75 Lacs to INR 1.91 lakh. This fee is to be paid on annual basis. highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Vivekanand College, Kolhapur Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Vivekanand College, Kolhapur offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Whereas, at PG level, Vivekanand College, Kolhapur offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. Vivekanand College, Kolhapur fee structure for all the courses is around INR 52,080 to 90,870.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good and better for all the courses.

review_content.Placements: Around 20% of students are placed. The highest salary package is 8 LPA and the lowest salary package is about 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Infosys, Wipro, and other companies. Around 10% of students got internships in the above companies. Many popular companies come for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many more facilities such as smart classes, improved laboratories, study rooms, gym, sports, Wi-Fi campus, and a special department for Statistics. Hostel is very good for girls. Canteen is good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are well educated and knowledgeable. Many have completed Ph.D. or doing. Teaching quality is good and easy. Students are prepared to be eligible for the industrial level. Exams conducted by college are not hard. The pass percentage is 98%.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a nice college with extra activities.

review_content.Placements: The college provides you with various educational degrees. For B.Com, no such placements or campus jobs were offered. The roles offered after B.Com were of various types as in the accounts field. Many students pursue CA, CS, and other competitive exams with B.Com. Graduation works as the base for these students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provided us with good labs, classes, education, a library with variety of books, huge ground, and a canteen. The sports department was ahead in every game like kho, tennis, badminton, chess, etc. There was a big gathering hall for cultural activities. The quality of food was good enough.

individual_reviews.title: A very good campus and friendly staff.

content.Placements: So, I am studying in the microbiology course, which provides me with an internship in the microbiology field. We get placements as per our performance and skills. The library of our college is very big, and all kinds of books are available there for students to study. We have smart classrooms and Wi-Fi facilities for students.

individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for education.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students get placed in our college in national and international companies. Many students get placed on campus with a salary of 1.5 LPM. My friend got placed with a salary of Rs.90,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is hygienic. All the labs and classrooms have sufficient equipment and air-conditioners. Wi-Fi service has been provided to all the classrooms and labs.
content.Faculty: Teaching quality is very good. I passed out with 82%. Teachers teach very well. Semester exams are conducted strictly. The pass percentage is 75-80%. The course curriculum makes students industry ready.

individual_reviews.title: It is an amazing college with helpful staff members, both teaching and non-teaching.

description: Vivekanand College, Kolhapur Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for admission to MCA courses based on the MAH MCA CET exam. Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:

The Vivekanand College, Kolhapur MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 35.28. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 51.32 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at Vivekanand College, Kolhapur was 35.28. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 49.48 in 2024.
For other categories, candidates can use the provided filters.

Analysing MAH MBA CET cutoff trends provides invaluable insights to students into how admission dynamics and competitiveness for different courses change over time. Students can download year-wise cutoff lists from the table given below to have a better idea of the cutoff percentile changes over the years.

Vivekanand College, Kolhapur MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the All India and Home State quota. According to the MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025, the cutoff for MCA course admission ranged from 71.15 to 61.28 for the candidates belonging to the General AI category.

As per the MCA Cutoff 2025 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, the cutoff in the last round of admission was 61.28. Students can refer to the table below to know more about other categories and quotas, and rounds year-wise cutoff of 2025, 2024, and 2023.

reviews.review_heading: A very good campus and friendly staff.
reviews.review_text: We have a good and well-developed laboratory. All equipment related to practicals is available and in good condition. The library of our college is very big, and all kinds of books are available there for students to study. We have smart classrooms and Wi-Fi facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for education.
reviews.review_text: Our college is hygienic. All the labs and classrooms have sufficient equipment and air-conditioners. Wi-Fi service has been provided to all the classrooms and labs.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good and better for all the courses.
reviews.review_text: There are many more facilities such as smart classes, improved laboratories, study rooms, gym, sports, Wi-Fi campus, and a special department for Statistics. Hostel is very good for girls. Canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a nice college with extra activities.
reviews.review_text: The college provided us with good labs, classes, education, a library with variety of books, huge ground, and a canteen. The sports department was ahead in every game like kho, tennis, badminton, chess, etc. There was a big gathering hall for cultural activities. The quality of food was good enough.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing college with helpful staff members, both teaching and non-teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome here, and the canteen is good. There is a huge parking space and an amazing library with a plethora of books from different streams. There is an NCC squad who are trained, and sports and games are always considered. Inter-school competitions are organised where students can share their ideas.

reviews.review_heading: Our college offers good placement offers for brilliant students.
reviews.review_text: There are different departments like chemistry, zoology, botany, mathematics, statistics, physics, microbiology, biochemistry and computer science. There are also different courses like BBA foundry, B.Com and B.A. There is no hostel for boys, but girls have a hostel. There is a canteen for students and also for staff members. Our college also has a library, Wi-Fi facility, labs and classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: The college is the best for future growth.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, library, playground, tennis court, basketball court, gym, and lavish parking were available. The quality of the mess and canteen was excellent, and medical facilities were also provided. Sports events were conducted according to batches. Hostels were very clean and neat.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the best college today, value for money and education.
reviews.review_text: Hostels were very good, and the canteens were hygienic. Water purifiers were available on every floor. Good classrooms and digital classrooms were available. The teaching staff was experienced and highly educated. They focused on every student, particularly, and provided.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Neotia University are BTech and MBA. The college offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nautical Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good for knowledge but not for placement.

content.Placements: It was there some years ago, but since the year I joined, the placement has dropped, and only a few cadets are getting placed here. It's not even 50%. They're trying to place us, but not in good companies. Firstly, they assured us that they would provide 100% placement, but I can't see them staying true to their word.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was good when it was built, but the maintenance by the college is very poor. They choose the cheapest way to repair and use that material for a long time. Accommodation isn't enough for boys who stay in a group in one room. The food quality isn't too good; we have to raise our voice every time for food.

individual_reviews.title: I am very happy, absolutely satisfied.

The placement record of our course is quite good compared to other streams in the same year. Almost 75-80 percent of students are placed in various reputed companies. The average package is 4-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good and supports the overall academic environment, with spacious and well-ventilated classrooms with proper seating arrangements, all classes containing projects and Wi-Fi, a library, and good sports facilities on campus.

admission_overview.college_name: The Neotia University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: The Neotia University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: The Neotia University admission is primarily entrance-based. The university provides several programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in the fields of Engineering, Architecture, Computer Applications, Microbiology, Science, Management, and more. The admission process for the university commences online. Also known as TNU, students are accepted based on their performance in the last qualifying exam. Interested students can read the following article to know about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process for The Neotia University.

paragraphs: The Neotia University admissionis primarily entrance-based. The university provides several programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in the fields of Engineering, Architecture, Computer Applications, Microbiology, Science, Management, and more. The admission process for the university commences online. Also known asTNU, students are accepted based on their performance in the last qualifying exam. Interested students can read the following article to know about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process for The Neotia University.

The Neotia University course admissionis subject to clearance of the preset eligibility. Students seeking to enrol in any of the offered courses are required to qualify for the admission criteria and apply as per the university's guidelines. Those seeking admission into the UG courses need to have passed Class 12 with relevant subjects. Similarly, for PG admissions. candidates must have passed graduation. To get into the PhD courses, students need to have a PG degree in the relevant field. Additionally, candidates must appear for the entrance test/ PI conducted by the university. Students can check out the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forTNU courses:
Class 12 with 60% aggregate in the Science stream from a recognised board
Class 12 with 60% aggregate in Science stream (55% for BSc- RMI, 50% for BHHA, BHHA with Swiss Diploma) from a recognised board
Class 12 with 50% to 60% aggregate in relevant stream from a recognised board
BSc with 55% aggregate in a relevant discipline from a recognised university
BTech/ BE with 60% aggregate in a relevant discipline from a recognised university
Class 12 with 60% aggregate from a recognised board
Class 12 with 50% aggregate in Commerce stream from a recognised board
Bachelor's degree with 55% aggregate from a recognised university
Master's degree with at least 55% aggregate from a recognised university
Step 1: TNU Application Process

Candidates can participate in the TNU admission process by filling out an application form in online mode. Candidates can either visit the official website. They also must pay an application fee for UG & PG courses at the time of submitting the application form.
Step 2: TNU Selection Round

The Neoti University admissions are entrance-based. Students are offered admission based on candidates' past academic merit for UG & PG courses, respectively. For UG courses, students need to appear for the entrance exam conducted by the university. However, for PG courses, candidates must also appear for the PI round.
Step 3: TNU Final Admission

faqs.answer: The candidate must be having at least 55% marks in his/her graduation level for being eligible for the admission . Apart from this he/she must be in the merit list after qualifying the university aptitude test followed by a personal interview round . Having experience in this field is not mandatory but will definitely increase your chances of grabbing a seat in the prestigiousNeotiaUniversity.

faqs.question: Which is the top course of The Neotia University?
faqs.answer: The top course at The Neotia University includes B.Tech, with its courses in management related to it. This set of courses is widely appreciated because of various opportunities available for students and the excellent placement records for students. Many courses require that one first clear the aptitude test of the university and further interview round only for some courses. Science and technology programs are mainly focused on B.Tech.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to The Neotia University?
faqs.answer: No, you will not get direct admission into The Neotia University. Most courses have merit-based admissions wherein eligibility will be determined by your last qualifying examination. Personal interviews are there for PG courses. While, PhD admission will be based on national/state-level entrance exams. If one has not appeared for any such exam then this university itself conducts the entrance test.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in the Neotia University?
faqs.answer: The Neotia University admissionsare open for 2024. The university offers a wide range of programmes at UG, PG, and doctoral levels, mainly in the field of Engineering, IT & Software, Science, Pharmacy, Nursing, Humanities, Agriculture, Management, etc. To get admitted to Neotia University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Candidates seeking admission to the BTech programme must be Class 12 passed with 60% aggregate in the Science stream.

placement_data.title: Neotia University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Neotia University (TNU) provides mandatory Internship Programmes for all Undergraduate and Postgraduate Students. As part of the course curriculum, Neotia University students have interned at various Corporate Houses, Research Institutes, and Healthcare Organizations, such as WABCO, Amazon Development Centre India, Serum Institute of India, NIMHANS, Apollo Gleneagles, Hyatt Regency, The Lalit Great Eastern, and many more.

Neotia University has released the placement stats for the Class of 2024. As per the latest report, Neotia University recorded 71.97% overall placements in the academic year 2023-2024. A total of 503 students registered for the placement assistance of which 362 were placed in reputed companies. The Neotia University average package offered to the CSE Data Science students in 2024 stood at INR 4.2 LPA . Further, the average package offered to BBA and BA LLB students during Neotia University placements in 2024 was INR 4.22 LPA and INR 3 LPA , respectively.

The participating recruiters placed 18 BBA students, 7 BCom, 3 BA LLB, 4 BBA LLB, 45 BHM students during Neotia University placements 2024. The top recruiters of Neotia University in 2024 included QSpiders, TCS, Intellipaat, Lenskart , Wipro, Tech Mahindra, HCL, Trident , etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: The Neotia University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: There are 4 nos. of hostels inside the boundary wall of campus, out of which 3 hostels are for boys and girls accommodating no. mention above with dedicated canteen and common rooms in each hostel building with security guards and power backup 24x7. There are 604 students staying in hostels within the campus boundary, out which there are 140 girls students and 460 boys.

library.description: The university library has the collection of 41000 books from 5022 titles. The library also has the subscription of 71 National and International Journals allowing the students to access 87063 nos. of e-books and online journals. The library provides the facilities of e-learning through online Web and Video courses in Engineering, Sciences, Technology provided by National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Medical Lab, Physics Lab, Applied Mechanics Lab, Seamanship Lab, Material Testing Lab, Electrical Machinery Lab, Electrical Measurement Lab, Control and Simulator Lab, Bridge Simulator Lab, Food Production Labs

reviews.review_heading: Good for knowledge but not for placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good when it was built, but the maintenance by the college is very poor. They choose the cheapest way to repair and use that material for a long time. Accommodation isn't enough for boys who stay in a group in one room. The food quality isn't too good; we have to raise our voice every time for food.

reviews.review_heading: I am very happy, absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good and supports the overall academic environment, with spacious and well-ventilated classrooms with proper seating arrangements, all classes containing projects and Wi-Fi, a library, and good sports facilities on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, a beautiful campus, nice people, and good placement.
reviews.review_text: We have smart classrooms, Wi-Fi availability in hostels, a swimming pool, a multipurpose hall, playgrounds, and every sports facility, as well as a medical hub for health issues, cafeterias, and opportunities for singing, dancing, public speaking, etc.

reviews.review_heading: TNU appears to offer a solid campus life with good infrastructure and helpful faculty.
reviews.review_text: The campus is consistently described as spacious and well-equipped, with a "green, clean" environment and a variety of amenities. Classrooms are often smart and digital. smart boards and labs are available for various departments. The central library is frequently praised.

reviews.review_heading: The facilities and the quality of education could be improved, somehow, I am satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good, it's a green campus, trees are planted everywhere, and each department has a separate building. Roads are good, and hostels are also good. But classrooms are non-AC and desks vary in each class. And also, it's too hot in the summer in the classes.

reviews.review_heading: This college is capable for higher studies .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. Classrooms are digital, and every lab is present in the department for each subject. Library is also present in the department. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is not bad. Hostel graduation are here in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of agriculture department.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has excellent infrastructure and facilities for students. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and there is a swimming pool and a gym for the students. The labs are equipped with modern machines and equipment, which the students can use for experiments.

reviews.review_heading: This college is also good for higher studies and to pursue a better career.
reviews.review_text: The library is also present in our department. The classroom is digital. Labs are present in our department for each subject. The university campus is big. Two football grounds are present, one of them small and the other is big.

reviews.review_heading: This college is also good for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in our college. All facilities are available in our department. The library and digital classroom room also present. Labs were present in the department for each subject. CCTV is available on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, average faculty members, and good placement.
reviews.review_text: Our department offers smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a resourceful library. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms. Mess food is average but hygienic. Medical aid is available, and sports/games facilities support overall development.

reviews.review_heading: Don't miss the chance to study at this university.
reviews.review_text: To be honest, infrastructure is one of the best we have. Library, classroom, and labs are well decorated, neat and clean, and AC is provided with wi-fi. All facilities we are getting in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: In our department, 90% placement.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the Wi-Fi network is fast. The library and classes are good. Some classrooms have AC, but not all. Medical facilities are also present here that help you always.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The college has an excellent infrastructure that creates a supportive and comfortable learning environment. The classrooms were spacious, well-ventilated, and equipped with modern teaching aids such as smart boards and projectors. The library was well stocked with a wide range of academic resources, reference books, and access to a digital learning platform.

reviews.review_heading: Great infra, average faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our department offers smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a resourceful library. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms. The mess food is average but hygienic. Medical aid is available, and sports/games facilities support overall development.

reviews.review_heading: Green campus, average study.
reviews.review_text: I would genuinely say that the infrastructure can be better, and on the other hand, the facilities are quite good. Just a few classrooms and labs have AC, the rest of the others just have ceiling fans. Wi-Fi is mostly available everywhere on the campus. The central library is very huge and a good place to study.

data.description: Yes, The Neotia University offers hostel facilities to students. However, there are limited rooms and hence, the admission is provided on a 'First Come, First Serve' basis. The university offers double-occupancy and triple-occupancy rooms. The hostel fee for the batch of 2025-26 is INR 45,000 per semester . Additionally, candidates must pay a one-time Hostel Security fee of INR 23,000. Out of the total security fee, INR 15,000 is refundable.

paragraphs: The Neotia University offers several merit-based and need-based scholarships and sponsorships to deserving students. The university offers these scholarships in the form of fee waivers ranging from 25% to 100% on tuition fees.

Neotia University offers a list of scholarships for Indian, Nepal, and Bhutan international students based on students' marks in their last qualifying examination. For UG courses, scholarships will be given based on Class 12 (best of 5 subjects)/ Diploma. For PG, overall graduation marks will be considered. TNU doesn't have any fixed number of students to avail of the scholarships offered, and if a student is eligible as per the set criteria then he or she will be able to avail the scholarships. The table below lists the various TNU scholarships along with their percentage of scholarships:
Sports Scholarship

Note: Apart from the above-mentioned criteria, scholarship percentages also vary depending on students' financial condition, cultural participation, and sports championships. Also, students are eligible for financial support from only one scheme, multiple scholarships cannot be awarded to a single student.
tables: For UG Courses - Class 12 (best of 5 subjects) / Diploma Marks

Sahodarya Scholarship(Siblings of all students - present or passed out)

college_info.intro:
Some of the popular programmes offered at RIMT University include BTech and MTech. For BTech admissions, students must have passed Class 12 exam with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one among Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject with at least 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category students) in all subjects taken together.
On the other hand, for MTech course, students must have a bachelor’s degree in Engineering or equivalent in the relevant field with at least 50% aggregate (45% in case of reserved category candidates). Students can check the RIMT University popular programmes in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    The placement at the Regional Institute of Management and Technology University is generally better for MBA students compared to BTech students. As per the Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024, the median package offered during RIMT University BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA, respectively. Hence, the placement package offered to MBA graduates is slightly higher than the BTech course. However, according to the reports, the number of BTech student
faqs.question: Which has better placement at RIMT University, BTech or MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    The RIMT university's placement cell is said to be cooperative and has a decent placement rate. Further, the university claimed that it has recorded 100% placements during the recent placement drive. Apart from this, as per the Management NIRF reports 2024  the median package offered during RIMT University MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4.57 LPA. However, to be very precise there is no such thing as a 100% placement guarantee, students can get placement opportunities from the university'
faqs.question: Does RIMT University provide 100% placements for MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    RIMT University has a placements cell that takes charge of all placement-related matters for students across Management departmentt. The cell aims to align recruiter expectations with the aspirations of MBA students, ensuring a mutually beneficial placement experience. Some of the top recruiters, mentioned at RIMT University's official website are: Bajaj Capital Bank of America Amazon Pay IBM Tata Consultancy Services HDFC Bank

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
RIMT University offers over 250 UG, PG, diploma and doctoral courses to the students across various fields such as Engineering, Science, Management, Agriculture, Design, Pharmacy, Health Science, Education, Arts and Humanities, Computer & IT and Commerce & Accounting, among others. For admission, candidates are required to meet with the minimum eligibility criteria set by the University.

Majority of the UG courses have a duration ranging between three to five years and for most of the PG courses, the duration is two years. Students can check the RIMT University courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:     College is charging genuine fees for all courses they provides. College fees for B.Tech is 1.11 Lacs (for 1 st year), B.Sc is 1.04 Lacs (for 1st year), MBA is 1.02 Lacs (1st year fees), Diploma -1.34 Lacs (1st year).Fees of this college is very normal for every course, you can choose this as a option according to fees.College placement is little bit lower, as only 60% of the students gets placement from this college.You can directly took admission in this college .Only for B.Tech, you need more than 60% in 12th boards
faqs.question: How costly is RIMT University?

faqs.answer: A:    Hello Nishar Ahmed, this private University established almost 25 years ago in 1998 at a place called Mandi Gobindgarh in Punjab,  is quite popular among students of Northern India. For seeking admission in MBA of 2 years in this university, the requirements are quite simple or normal. A student needs to obtain his degree with 50% aggregate marks and also 12th with 50% of aggregate marks. This university accepts ranking or scoring in any of the different management entrance exams conducted in India like MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT or GMAT. You can get insights into the admission process for not only this course but there are plenty of other Management courses after graduation in this university, via link that I am attaching below:-https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/admissionBest wishes to you.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is required for MBA at RIMT University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, you can easily took admission in this college. As this is a private college, there are lot of seats available .But for B.Tech you should have given JEE Mains with more than 45% in 12th boards exams.For B.Com, students need 50 % in commerce stream in 12th boards.For BCA, just any students who have completed thier 12th boards can took admissions.College accepts Cbse 12th as well as PSEB 12th .Contact to the college offline or else register your details on their website, you can easily get a seat in this college
faqs.question: Is RIMT University hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee for the BA programme at RIMT University is INR 580. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid during the online application process. To complete the application, candidates need to visit the university's official admission portal, where candidates have to register with their personal email ID and mobile number.This fee is a crucial part of the application process and is required to finalise aspirants' submission.
faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.A at RIMT University?

reviews_list.review_title: A brief review of RIMT University.

review_content.Placements: Around 10% of students were placed from our course. The highest package offered was about Rs. 80000 per month in our course. Recruiting companies are diagnostic centers. Around 100% of students secured internships in different hospitals in their areas.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure like best furniture, 24/7 power supply, projectors in classrooms, one best library for every department. In hostels, beds, table chairs, almirah, Wi-Fi, and cooler/air-conditioners in each were placed. Facilities in hostel mess were excellent like good quality food, a good lighting system, and also the canteen food was the best. There was a multi-specialty hospital for students as well as the local public. In sports, almost every games were played in different places inside the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied by this institute. Well maintained infrastructure, well educated faculty.

review_content.Placements: Very few placements are provided by this university. This university offers less exposure, but it provides various industrial visits, which may help you get placed independently. There are many extracurricular activities that students should be involved in for overall development.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many libraries in this institution. Knowledge is key to success, and interested students can easily get it through this university year-round. Wi-Fi is not provided. Classrooms are well-maintained with air conditioning and curtains. It is a good institute to socialize.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Operation Theatre and Anaesthesia Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: RIMT University is the best university in India.

review_content.Placements: There were at least 40% placements which happened on the campus earlier, so that was just a beautiful initiative that took place on the campus. So the highest packages were - 2 lakhs LPA, low packages were like 1 lakh. Roles given by the company were operation theatre technician as well as anesthesia management.
review_content.Infrastructure: If I would talk about the infrastructure of the campus, that would be like we have a very unique experience there, like they had their own multi-specialty hospital on the campus as well. Emergency services were available, as well as the department was something which was way amazing.

faqs.answer: NTA released the re-revised scorecard on July 26, 2024. In this scorecard, the score has been revised as per the Supreme Court verdict of removing the bonus marks awarded earlier for the controversial Physics question, and deducting one mark from those who marked incorrect answer options. The city and centre-wise result data such as number of candidates appeared and scores obtained, by masking candidates' personal data was released on July 21, as per the Supreme Court order given on the hearing dated July 18, 2024. The NEET 2024 result for the re-exam, which was conducted on June 23, was declared on July 1, day day after the slated date. The final answer keys for the NEET 2024 re-exam was released by June 30, ahead of the result declaration. Earlier, the result of NEET 2024 was declared by NTA on June 4, 2024, 10 days ahead of the original schedule, which was June 14, 2024. NTA released the final NEET answer keys on June 4, prior to the release of the NEET result 2024. The NEET result was declared in an online mode. Candidates have to log in with their registration credentials or application number and date of birth, and download their scorecard in PDF format. NTA also released the merit list containing the name, Roll Number, All India Rank and Percentile of the candidates. Along with the NEET 2024 scorecard, NTA also released the NEET 2024 cutoff marks or the qualifying marks/scores.
faqs.question: Q: When did NTA release the NEET 2024 result?

overview_faqs.question: How costly is RIMT University?
overview_faqs.answer: College is charging genuine fees for all courses they provides. College fees for B.Tech is 1.11 Lacs (for 1 st year), B.Sc is 1.04 Lacs (for 1st year), MBA is 1.02 Lacs (1st year fees), Diploma -1.34 Lacs (1st year).Fees of this college is very normal for every course, you can choose this as a option according to fees.College placement is little bit lower, as only 60% of the students gets placement from this college.You can directly took admission in this college .Only for B.Tech, you need more than 60% in 12th boards

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.A at RIMT University?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee for the BA programme at RIMT University is INR 580. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid during the online application process. To complete the application, candidates need to visit the university's official admission portal, where candidates have to register with their personal email ID and mobile number.This fee is a crucial part of the application process and is required to finalise aspirants' submission.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses offered by RIMT University?
overview_faqs.answer: The RIMT University is UGC-approved and is accredited by the AICTE, Bar Council of India, Pharmacy Council of India, and Council of Architecture for its wide range of courses.Fees for various courses offered as follow-ups:For B.Sc. it offers 43 courses with the total tuition fees 2.8 L- 4.7 L and for M.Sc. it offers 33 courses total tuition fees for this course ranges from 1.4 L- 3.5 L. 4 courses are in B.Pharm with the total tuition fees 3.5L-5L And for B.E/B.Tech the fees is 3.7L-6.4L.Total tuition for UG Diploma is 39k - 1.4L and for BA.LL.B it is 5.3L . For B.A . 15 courses is available with total tuition fees 1.4 L-3.1L and for BPT is 4.2L.10 courses are in BBA and tatal fees for this course is 2.9L-4.2L.You can see fee structure for more courses at https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/courses

review_summary.college_name: RIMT University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college and day by day, they are improving the quality of the college.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students were placed in my course. The lowest package was 4.1 LPA and the highest was 7.1 LPA. Almost 90% of students got internships in my course. Supervisor and manager roles were provided to the students, and many students got posts in the same college after getting a good degree from the same college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, good classrooms, and a library were available. Good hostels and good food were served there. Many activity areas were available. RO water was available. ACs and coolers were also available. A good internet connection was set up for us so we could study well. Every class projectors were placed.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My best college in the world.

content.Placements: Above 50 students were placed in my course. The highest package was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 4 LPA. All top companies like Intel, and so many local companies hired students. 50% of students got internships at Intel. Role offered was a corporate lawyer in a firm.
content.Infrastructure: College provided all necessary facilities to students like free Wi-Fi, computer and science labs, proper classrooms, and different libraries for every department. Hostel provided healthy food to the hostler. It also provided good rooms and washrooms for all.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Radiology and Imaging Technology (MRIT) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: A brief review of RIMT University.

content.Placements: Around 10% of students were placed from our course. The highest package offered was about Rs. 80000 per month in our course. Recruiting companies are diagnostic centers. Around 100% of students secured internships in different hospitals in their areas.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure like best furniture, 24/7 power supply, projectors in classrooms, one best library for every department. In hostels, beds, table chairs, almirah, Wi-Fi, and cooler/air-conditioners in each were placed. Facilities in hostel mess were excellent like good quality food, a good lighting system, and also the canteen food was the best. There was a multi-specialty hospital for students as well as the local public. In sports, almost every games were played in different places inside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied by this institute. Well maintained infrastructure, well educated faculty.

content.Placements: Very few placements are provided by this university. This university offers less exposure, but it provides various industrial visits, which may help you get placed independently. There are many extracurricular activities that students should be involved in for overall development.
content.Infrastructure: There are many libraries in this institution. Knowledge is key to success, and interested students can easily get it through this university year-round. Wi-Fi is not provided. Classrooms are well-maintained with air conditioning and curtains. It is a good institute to socialize.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Operation Theatre and Anaesthesia Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: RIMT University is the best university in India.

content.Placements: There were at least 40% placements which happened on the campus earlier, so that was just a beautiful initiative that took place on the campus. So the highest packages were - 2 lakhs LPA, low packages were like 1 lakh. Roles given by the company were operation theatre technician as well as anesthesia management.
content.Infrastructure: If I would talk about the infrastructure of the campus, that would be like we have a very unique experience there, like they had their own multi-specialty hospital on the campus as well. Emergency services were available, as well as the department was something which was way amazing.

admission_overview.college_name: RIMT University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: RIMT University has 21 schools that offfer various UG, PG, diploma and PhD programmes in a wide range of specialisations like Management, Health Sciences, Engineering, Computer Science, etc. RIMT University admission 2025 is ongoing for all the courses. Candidates can visit the official webiste of the University and register for the selected course for further admission process. The University considers merit as well as entrance test scores for admission to different courses.
The table below mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for popular RIMT University courses:

A pass in Class 12 exam with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one among Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject with at least 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category students) in all subjects taken together
A pass in Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any stream

Those candidates who have passed their Class 10 along with a three-year Diploma in any trade from Punjab State Board of Technical Education & Industrial Training, Chandigarh or such Examination from any other recognised State Board of Technical Education
Merit-basis
A pass in Class 12 with 50% aggregate from Commerce stream
Merit-basis
A bachelor’s degree in Engineering or equivalent in the relevant field with at least 50% aggregate (45% in case of reserved category candidates)
A pass in BCom with at least 50% aggregate
A pass in any bachelor’s degree of minimum three-year duration from a recognised university
CAT/MAT/CMAT
A pass in Class 10 (or Class 12 for some specialisations) with 50% aggregate
Merit-basis

faqs.question: When did NTA release the NEET 2024 result?
faqs.answer: NTA released the re-revised scorecard on July 26, 2024. In this scorecard, the score has been revised as per the Supreme Court verdict of removing the bonus marks awarded earlier for the controversial Physics question, and deducting one mark from those who marked incorrect answer options. The city and centre-wise result data such as number of candidates appeared and scores obtained, by masking candidates' personal data was released on July 21, as per the Supreme Court order given on the hearing dated July 18, 2024. The NEET 2024 result for the re-exam, which was conducted on June 23, was declared on July 1, day day after the slated date. The final answer keys for the NEET 2024 re-exam was released by June 30, ahead of the result declaration. Earlier, the result of NEET 2024 was declared by NTA on June 4, 2024, 10 days ahead of the original schedule, which was June 14, 2024. NTA released the final NEET answer keys on June 4, prior to the release of the NEET result 2024. The NEET result

faqs.answer: Hello Nishar Ahmed, this private University established almost 25 years ago in 1998 at a place called Mandi Gobindgarh in Punjab,  is quite popular among students of Northern India.For seeking admission in MBA of 2 years in this university, the requirements are quite simple or normal. A student needs to obtain his degree with 50% aggregate marks and also 12th with 50% of aggregate marks. This university accepts ranking or scoring in any of the different management entrance exams conducted in India like MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT or GMAT.You can get insights into the admission process for not only this course but there are plenty of other Management courses after graduation in this university, via link that I am attaching below:-https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/admissionBest wishes to you.
