placement_data.title: RIMT University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The overall highest package offered during RIMT University placements stood at INR 30 LPA . Further, RIMT University has recorded 100% placements during the recent placement drive. Apart from this, as per the Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024 , the median package offered during RIMT University BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA , respectively. Earlier, according to the NIRF report 2023, 46 BTech and 7 MBA students were placed during RIMT University placements 2022. Further, the median package offered to BTech and MBA students during 2022 placements was INR 2.2 LPA and INR 2.04 LPA, respectively. Earlier, the highest package offered during RIMT University placements 2021 stood at INR 43 LPA . Moreover, more than 600 companies visited the campus during RIMT University placements 2021.

The university has released the Engineering and Management NIRF report 2023 that incorporates 2022 placement statistics for respective courses. Click on the below link to download the RIMT University placement data 2022:

faqs.question: How is the BPharm placements at RIMT University?
faqs.answer: RIMT University BPharm placement data has not been declared by the University. However, according to the placement NIRF data for the year 2024, the RIMT University BPharm median package offered ranges from INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA . Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: What are students opinion on BPharm placements at RIMT University?
faqs.answer: According to the verified Shiksha review , the BPharm students, and alumni of RIMT University describe the BPharm placements as good and well-maintained. Candidates can check some of the reviews below: Review 1: "Almost 100% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered is INR 67,600 per month. Almost 100% of students got internships from our course in many companies". Review 2: "Almost 90% of students are placed in our college. The highest salary offered is Rs.55,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is INR 20,000 per month. About 80% of students got internships. All types of courses and good offers are provided on the RIMT campus". Review 3: " B pharmacy is a professional course of four years it is a very good course I am having a great experience There are almost 80 students in my batch the highest package- is INR 3-4 LPA. The lowest package is INR 1.5-2 LPA The internship facilities are also very good many multinational companies came across our college for internships like Sun Pharmaceutical, etc.". Conclusively, students expressed their satisfaction towards the BPharm placements conducted by RIMT University. However, there may be some variation in placement outcomes depending on the year and batch of students.

faqs.question: Which has better placement at RIMT University, BTech or MBA?
faqs.answer: The placement at the Regional Institute of Management and Technology University is generally better for MBA students compared to BTech students. As per the Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024 , the median package offered during RIMT University BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA , respectively. Hence, the placement package offered to MBA graduates is slightly higher than the BTech course. However, according to the reports, the number of BTech students placed is more than the number of graduates placed from MBA courses.

faqs.question: Does RIMT University provide 100% placements for MBA?
faqs.answer: The RIMT university's placement cell is said to be cooperative and has a decent placement rate. Further, the university claimed that it has recorded 100% placements during the recent placement drive. Apart from this, as per the Management NIRF reports 2024 the median package offered during RIMT University MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4.57 LPA . However, to be very precise there is no such thing as a 100% placement guarantee, students can get placement opportunities from the university's side but, qualifying for the interview rounds, and skills & aptitude test are completely based on students, how they perform in that. Hence, the university is claiming that they offer 100% placements to their MBA students but, to get a job students must prepare themselves.

hostel.description: Rimt provides on-campus accommodation. All rooms are fully furnished; include utilities, Wi-Fi internet connection and meals which are prepared in-house by a chef. The usual dining schedule from Monday to Saturday comprises full breakfast, lunch and dinner, paid laundry facilities are also available. Students get a study desk and chair, chest of drawers, wardrobe, washbasin, and more. There are also adapted rooms in the halls for students with disabilities. Students also have access to computer labs, fitness centres, and swimming pools.

In hostels, beds, table chairs, almirah, Wi-Fi, and cooler/air-conditioners in each were placed. Facilities in hostel mess were excellent like good quality food, a good lighting system, and also the canteen food was the best. There was a multi-specialty hospital for students as well as the local public. In sports, almost every games were played in different places inside the c...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied by this institute. Well maintained infrastructure, well educated faculty.
reviews.review_text: There are many libraries in this institution. Knowledge is key to success, and interested students can easily get it through this university year-round. Wi-Fi is not provided. Classrooms are well-maintained with air conditioning and curtains. It is a good institute to socialize.

reviews.review_heading: RIMT University is the best university in India.
reviews.review_text: If I would talk about the infrastructure of the campus, that would be like we have a very unique experience there, like they had their own multi-specialty hospital on the campus as well. Emergency services were available, as well as the department was something which was way amazing.

reviews.review_heading: I have spent good quality time in this university, and I learned a lot from this university.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities in our hospital, proper labs, good internet connection, and classrooms are comfortable and in a noise-free area. A library is also available near the department. In the hostel, there are 2-seater and 3-seater rooms. AC and non-AC rooms are both available for students. The quality of food is good in our canteen, and the mess also provides hygienic food. 24-hour medical facility available, and all sports games are played in the university.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college and value for money. Every student should consider taking admission here.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of my course are good. Wi-Fi is also available, labs are well organized, and classrooms are neat and clean. The library is well-maintained. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is good, and the food quality is tasty. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The university is on GT Road and has a very good environment on campus.
reviews.review_text: They provide AC rooms with Wi-Fi. They provide us with books from the labs, and our department is very good and not far from the university's main gate. The department is near the university hospital and close to the entrance of the university.

reviews.review_heading: Really good campus life.
reviews.review_text: We were provided unlimited Wi-Fi, proper tables and chairs, and our own personal lockers in hostels. In our classrooms, there is AC and projectors, so visual learning is provided. Proper breakfast, lunch, snacks and dinner are given in the mess and in the canteen too.

reviews.review_heading: RIMT UNIVERSITY- Regional Institute of Management and Technology .
reviews.review_text:
infrastructure of Rimt university is good but according to me, it can be better if they painted all the departments There are many departments and hostels which are not fully made and painted 
Hostel facilities are not so good, but they can also be better.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure at Rimt and the design.
reviews.review_text: The hostel life in Rimt University is very good. The food quality is mid-range, and the menu of the mess is nearly updated every day. The canteen food is better, and medical as well as sports and other extracurricular activities are also available for the students residing in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment, excellent teaching, and best placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our course are good, like the library, which helps students with their respective subjects. And the classroom is well maintained, cleaned, and decorated. The quality of the hostel is average because in hostels there are hygiene problems that affect students health. And the food quality is average; they provide good food to the students, but some of the students complain that the food is bad for their health. So yes, this is the reason for giving an average rating to the hostel ...

reviews.review_heading: College is normal and the fees is high.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not good. It is average. The classes are not well developed. They are average like high schools. Hostels are very bad. Mess facility and washrooms are very bad. The rooms are not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a top-level university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our classrooms are neat. Our labs are good and decent. The food served in the mess is good and hygienic. Our university has a hospital. Our college has many sports grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for engineering students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best facilities in the hostel room for students. Wi-Fi facility is available at high speed in our hostel rooms. There is an RJ-45 connector installed for hostelers. The food served in the mess is good compared to other colleges.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about RIMT University

likes.text: Companies like HDFC Bank, Vardhman, Axis Bank, Future Retail, Tommy Hilfiger, etc., visited our campus for placements.

paragraphs: The application fee for the BA programme at RIMT University is INR 580. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid during the online application process. To complete the application, candidates need to visit the university's official admission portal, where candidates have to register with their personal email ID and mobile number.This fee is a crucial part of the application process and is required to finalise aspirants' submission.
College is charging genuine fees for all courses they provides.
College fees for B.Tech is 1.11 Lacs (for 1 st year), B.Sc is 1.04 Lacs (for 1st year), MBA is 1.02 Lacs (1st year fees), Diploma -1.34 Lacs (1st year).
Fees of this college is very normal for every course, you can choose this as a option according to fees.
College placement is little bit lower, as only 60% of the students gets placement from this college.
You can directly took admission in this college .Only for B.Tech, you need more than 60% in 12th boards
The RIMT University is UGC-approved and is accredited by the AICTE, Bar Council of India, Pharmacy Council of India, and Council of Architecture for its wide range of courses.
Fees for various courses offered as follow-ups:
For B.Sc. it offers 43 courses with the total tuition fees 2.8 L- 4.7 L and for M.Sc. it offers 33 courses total tuition fees for this course ranges from 1.4 L- 3.5 L.
4 courses are in B.Pharm with the total tuition fees 3.5L-5L And for B.E/B.Tech the fees is 3.7L-6.4L.
Total tuition for UG Diploma is 39k - 1.4L and for BA.LL.B it is 5.3L .
For B.A . 15 courses is available with total tuition fees 1.4 L-3.1L and for BPT is 4.2L.
10 courses are in BBA and tatal fees for this course is 2.9L-4.2L.
You can see fee structure for more courses at https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/courses

The hostel fee for BCom students at RIMT University varies depending on the type of accommodation and facilities selected by the students, check out the table given below to know about the amount of hostel fee according to the available accomodation:
This hsotel fee structure includes food, accommodation, swimming pool, laundry,  24*7 WiFi, four-times meal, gym, sports and cinema

reviews_list.review_title: Good college for poor students because of low fees.

review_content.Placements: In my college, the highest package is 10 Lacs, and the lowest is 5 Lacs, with the average package being 8 Lacs. Top recruiting companies like Wipro, Angel One, and other local financial companies are there. 25 percent of students got internships in different companies. Professions like accountant, data analytics, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college, the campus is very big. There are all types of departments as per the field of education, each with a different library, big classrooms with digital boards, canteen, and playground. Labs are available, but there is no Wi-Fi for students. In the hostel, the food is not well, and the mess is also not like home food.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My college and their campus are the best in Aurangabad.

review_content.Placements: 40 to 50 percent of students are placed in my college. The highest package is 20 lakhs per annum, and the lowest package is 9 lakhs per annum offered by my college. The recruiting companies are Wipro, Wockhardt, TCS, etc. 20-30 percent of students got internships in TCS and Wipro companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college, the facilities available are labs, labs provided any books for the syllabus, and without the syllabus, examples of politicians, comedians, GK, etc. Classrooms are very well, but not provided with digital boards in my classroom and available library, etc. Mess and canteen are also available .

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Mine journey with Deogiri College.

review_content.Placements: There is less campus placement in Deogiri College for M.Sc. students. Top recruiting companies like Wipro, TCS, and some startups for computer science-related courses. A lot of my colleagues have done internships during the academic year. Average students are placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Course infrastructure is great, as well as computer labs for practice. The library is also there, with a lot of books for reference. The hostel is good, and security is also there for the girls' hostel. The boys' hostel is far away from the girls' hostel. A canteen is also there for meals.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (B.B.A.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It provides a positive experience with qualified faculty, good infrastructure, & decent placements.

content.Placements: Around 20 percent to 30 percent of students from our college get placed, with an average annual salary of Rs. 300,000. Most recruiters are from the management sector offering roles in operations marketing and business development. The college supports students through placement drives workshops and training sessions to enhance their skills and prepare them for the recruitment process.
content.Infrastructure: Our college offers excellent facilities including WiFi well maintained classrooms and high quality food in the mess and canteen. It also provides medical services along with a dedicated sports and games department for students. The campus is clean organized and provides a comfortable learning environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is nice.

content.Placements: All the students who have done regular college and regular studies got placements. Minimum salary is 2 LPA, and maximum salary is 6 LPA. Recruiting companies are Derma, Mediplus, Cipla, Aerostar, etc. More than 90% of students got internships. All those who studied properly got a job at very nice place.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are given good. Full facilities are given to the students. Wi-Fi, study labs, and tight security are available. College environment is good and fresh. Hostel warden's behaviour is so good. College canteen is also very good. The canteen is much big for students' requirements.

paragraphs: Deogiri College admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingBusiness and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science, Teaching and Education and Animation.Deogiri Collegeadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asMaharashtra HSC and CBSE 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 3 years.

description: Deogiri College Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for admission to MCA courses based on the MAH MCA CET exam. Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:

The Maharashtra CET Cell has released the MH CET Law cutoff 2025 for all rounds and categories for both the AI and HS quota candidates. In the first round, the cutoff percentile for admission to the B.A. LL.B. course was 67.74, while in the last round, the cutoff was 76.35 percentile.
Refer to the table below to know the first and last round cutoff data for the General AI category.

Deogiri College MH CET Law cutoff 2025 can be accessed in this section. Students can also view the past two year cutoff data, i.e., of 2024, and 2023. In 2025, the MH CET Law cutoff was 76.35 for B.A. LL.B. and programme in the last round.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the provided filters.

Students can get an idea of the cutoff trends for the past three years, i.e., of 2025, 2024, and 2023 from the table provided below. Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated cutoff pdfs for future reference.

The Deogiri College MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 1.58. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 28.06 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at Deogiri College was 1.58.
For other categories, candidates can use the provided filters.

Analysing MAH MBA CET cutoff trends provides invaluable insights to students into how admission dynamics and competitiveness for different courses change over time. Students can download year-wise cutoff lists from the table given below to have a better idea of the cutoff percentile changes over the years.

Deogiri College MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the All India and Home State quota. According to the MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025, the cutoff for MCA course admission ranged from 67.36 to 74.78 for the candidates belonging to the General AI category.
For the General HS category, the cutoff range was 77.83 to 74.78. To know more cutoff information about other categories, rounds, and quotas, see the table below:

As per the MCA Cutoff 2025 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, the cutoff in the last round of admission was 74.78. Students can refer to the table below to know more about other categories and quotas, and rounds year-wise cutoff of 2025, 2024, and 2023.

reviews.review_heading: It provides a positive experience with qualified faculty, good infrastructure, & decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers excellent facilities including WiFi well maintained classrooms and high quality food in the mess and canteen. It also provides medical services along with a dedicated sports and games department for students. The campus is clean organized and provides a comfortable learning environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college is nice.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are given good. Full facilities are given to the students. Wi-Fi, study labs, and tight security are available. College environment is good and fresh. Hostel warden's behaviour is so good. College canteen is also very good. The canteen is much big for students' requirements.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for poor students because of low fees.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the campus is very big. There are all types of departments as per the field of education, each with a different library, big classrooms with digital boards, canteen, and playground. Labs are available, but there is no Wi-Fi for students. In the hostel, the food is not well, and the mess is also not like home food.

reviews.review_heading: My college and their campus are the best in Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the facilities available are labs, labs provided any books for the syllabus, and without the syllabus, examples of politicians, comedians, GK, etc. Classrooms are very well, but not provided with digital boards in my classroom and available library, etc. Mess and canteen are also available .

reviews.review_heading: Mine journey with Deogiri College.
reviews.review_text: Course infrastructure is great, as well as computer labs for practice. The library is also there, with a lot of books for reference. The hostel is good, and security is also there for the girls' hostel. The boys' hostel is far away from the girls' hostel. A canteen is also there for meals.

reviews.review_heading: College has value for money with good infrastructure and quality education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at our college are very good. College has its own lab on the campus itself. We have a canteen in our college where one will get decent quality food. Classrooms are also well-equipped. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls at a very low cost.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, friendly students, and a big campus
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department and campus for students are good. I don't know about hostel facilities and services. There are different department of different course. I don't know about hostel menu and meal facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Deogiri college review.
reviews.review_text: I am not from the hostel, so I don't know about the hostel facilities, but the department's infrastructure is good. There are computer labs, and the Wi-Fi is also reliable. The classrooms are spacious, but I personally don't like the canteen much, as there is a lack of hygiene in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: The latest overall college review.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of the college and the campus is very good. There is greenery and cleanliness has been maintained in all areas. All the classroom libraries, like the computer library, are well developed, as are the medical facilities, sports and games, and canteens. All the facilities are up-to-date.

reviews.review_heading: Good College for student who are interested in doing BBA course.
reviews.review_text: Deogiri College is one of the best colleges in terms of infrastructure in Aurangabad city. All the classrooms are digital with projectors fitted, and labs are also available. The college campus has Wi-Fi facilities for both staff and students. The library is good, with the availability of all essential books.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel for engineering boys was separate. The hostel has a total of 4 floors. Every floor is separate for every year of students. There are about 16 rooms on each floor. Every student gets separate cupboards. Tables and chairs were provided. The meal quality was good. The unlimited meal was provided in the mess of the hostel. Hostel registration is an online process. One can apply to a hostel through the college's website. There are many other rooms available in the college area for students...

reviews.review_heading: The college has good campus and teachers, but not good curriculum.
reviews.review_text: There are good classrooms in the campus which are kept neat and clean. Also, there are smart classrooms for the students. The Library is very impressive having a lot of books which you can read after the classes. The hostel is average and the food is also average for the students who live in the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: My educational experience at Deogiri College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with proper facilities like washrooms, ladies' rooms, labs, libraries, spacious classrooms, and a staff room. Medical and food facilities are okay, but the canteen is good. The sports ground is very large, and various games and sports activities take place every month.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, 2020 batch.
reviews.review_text: Colleges have combined campuses. For all Deogiri colleges, we have combined sports grounds, mostly dominated by engineering students. We do not have Wi-Fi jammers placed everywhere in college. Even you cannot call someone. But in the computer lab, we all have internet access. The hostel is beside the college building, and the food is awesome. At breakfast, they give eggs and fruits, and at dinner and lunch, it is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Deogiri College M.Sc.  IT.
reviews.review_text: In our combined campus for Engineering and Management students, our ground is very small, and there is no Wi-Fi available in college. Our classroom benches and boards have become old and need to be replaced. We have hostels provided by the college where for breakfast, we get a meal with eggs, fruits, and a special dish made on Sundays.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Deogiri College

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Wipro, TCS, Capgemini, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra and Accenture are visiting our campus.
The maximum number of students get placed in our course, and I get my offers in the course.

college_info.intro:
Starex University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The university gives a BTech programme in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, CSE, Cyber Security & Digital Forensics, Cyber Security, Azure Data, Cloud & AI Developer, and others. It is a full-time, four-year programme, spanning over 8 semesters. BTech students can work as Database Administrator, Software Developer, Data Scientist, Cyber Security Analyst, and others.
Starex University offers a two-year MBA programme. The MBA curriculum offered at the university includes case studies, industry projects and internship opportunities for the students. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Finance Managers, Marketing Research Analysts, Business Analyst, Investment Banker, and others. Below are some of the programmes offered by Starex University:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is good until we talk about placements.

review_content.Placements: Only, on average, 20% of students get placed. The highest package is around 320000 and the lowest package is 120000. Companies like Cipla, Medicament, etc. are the top recruiters. 60 to 70 percent students get internship in various companies like Medicament, etc. Roles offered are quality control, analysis, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in our department, like WiFi, labs, classrooms and libraries. Our classroom has ACs. The hostel facility was also good; the food was not bad. On our campus, we have a hospital so medical facilities are available 24 hours a day. All types of sports are available in our college like football, cricket, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master in Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: College gives the best experience.

review_content.Placements: The placement process starts with NASSCOM, which has a tie-up with the University, providing perfect training for placements. Once we train and reach the final year, placements start with big firms like Accenture, IBM, Merkle, Seagate, Deloitte, and Amazon conducting campus interviews. The salary package is different for all companies, with the highest being 15 LPA and the average being 5-6 LPA. In our batch, the college did not provide internships. They tried their best; maybe they can start internships from this year. Roles depend on the company.

review_summary.college_name: Starex University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Radio and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I think there are no good placements here. I did not see or hear from any student about this.

content.Placements: A very few students attend the college regularly. Teachers do not come to the classroom. Students go for internships at their own risk. The college treats internships as a very last option, because it seems like the paramedics course is a waste in this college.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in classes or labs, and the classrooms are not cleaned properly. It is cleaned only once a week. It is in very poor condition, with a school-type desk, and there is no proper seating at the desk. It is very painful, I daily think why I should go to college or waste money, one should opt for this college at their own risk.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (AI & ML) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Pretty decent college with good infrastructure and average placement ratio.

content.Placements: The placement ratio of Starex University is not very good; maybe 2 out of 10 students get placed on average. The highest package is somewhere around 10 LPA, and the average is 3.6 LPA. Most of the students are hired by new startups and some of the MNCs like Wipro, TCS, etc. The internship ratio is very low; 1 out of 10 get a paid internship here.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decently good at Starex University. It gives a foreign university vibe. Classrooms and the library are well-maintained, and no Wi-Fi is allowed for students. The hostel is also decent with all the required facilities. The hostel warden is very good and supportive.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good until we talk about placements.

content.Placements: Only, on average, 20% of students get placed. The highest package is around 320000 and the lowest package is 120000. Companies like Cipla, Medicament, etc. are the top recruiters. 60 to 70 percent students get internship in various companies like Medicament, etc. Roles offered are quality control, analysis, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in our department, like WiFi, labs, classrooms and libraries. Our classroom has ACs. The hostel facility was also good; the food was not bad. On our campus, we have a hospital so medical facilities are available 24 hours a day. All types of sports are available in our college like football, cricket, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Master in Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: College gives the best experience.

content.Placements: The placement process starts with NASSCOM, which has a tie-up with the University, providing perfect training for placements. Once we train and reach the final year, placements start with big firms like Accenture, IBM, Merkle, Seagate, Deloitte, and Amazon conducting campus interviews. The salary package is different for all companies, with the highest being 15 LPA and the average being 5-6 LPA. In our batch, the college did not provide internships. They tried their best; maybe they can start internships from this year. Roles depend on the company.

individual_reviews.course: Master in Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Previous year, 80% of students were placed in various companies.

content.Placements: For us (MBA ) end of 2nd semester we are eligible for placement drives but for a job after 3rd semester is complete the college will grant permission to join the job and also have an opportunity for an off-campus drive. Around 15 to 18 companies visited our college and around 75 to 80 percent of students got placement. Our courses the highest package is 14 lac and our course average package is around 5 lac. Some of the students make startups and join the jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Modern hostel facilities are provided separately for both boys and girls of the college. The rooms at the hostel have basic facilities and are fully furnished with furniture that helps the students to study and live there peaceful. The entire hostel is Wi-Fi enabled and has 24 into 7 electricity and water supply. Feels for the hostel are as follows- For AC rooms, single-sharing rooms cost around 1.3 Lacs per year. Twin sharing 1.2 Lacs per year. Triple sharing 1.1 Lacs per year. For AC rooms, twin sharing is 1 Lacs per year, and for triple sharing, it is 90000 per year.

admission_overview.college_name: Starex University Course Admissions 2025: Fee, Eligibility, Selection, Application Process, Placements

paragraphs: Starex University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. Candidates need to appear for the test or personal interview round to get admission in UG or PG programmes.Starex Universityoffers more than 48 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. The university offers courses in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, Commerce, etc. Interested candidates can fill out the application form online.

The university offers courses in full-time mode through 12 schools. BPharm, BTech and MBA are some of the popular courses offered by the university. Below are the key highlights forStarex University admissions:
Particulars
Starex University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
How to apply?
https://www.starexuniversity.com/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
Starex University Course Details

The university offers admission based on a test or personal interview round. Candidates need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Below are popularStarex University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Starex University opens the registration portal as a first step of the admission process. Candidates are first required to apply for the preferred course. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:
STEP 1: Starex University Application Process 2025

Candidates need to apply for the course of their choice via online mode. Aspirants will need to register with the basic details to generate the login credentials. Candidates have to pay an application fee to register for a course at Starex University.
STEP 2: Selection

Once the application process is completed, the university starts selecting candidates for admission. The selection is based on test scores or performance in the personal interview round. Based on performance in the selection rounds, aspirants become eligible for admission.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment

After the final selection is over, candidates are informed by mail or call by the authorities. These students then need to get their documents verified and pay the admission fee to confirm their seat in the university.

courses_data.name: Starex University BTech Admission Process 2025
courses_data.description: Starex University offers four-year BTech course divided into eight semesters. The university offers BTech inCSE with AI & ML, Cyber Security & Digital Forensics with academic support by Samatrix, etc. The selection for BTech course is based on score in the test conducted by the university or performance in the personal interview round.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics and secured at least 45% aggregate are eligible to apply for the course. Besides, the selection for Starex University BTech is further done based on the candidate's performance in the entrance test/ personal interview round.

Hence, the actual amount may vary.

In addition, the mentioned hostel fee is for Non-AC (3-Sharing) plus the security charges. At the time of application form filling, aspirants have to pay the application fee as well to submit the form su

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Starex University offers a two-year MBA programme divided into four semesters. The university offers MBA in Business Analytics with academic support by IBM and Data Pioneers -Azure Ascendancy with academic support by Microsoft. Aspirants must complete bachelor's degree of a minimum of three-years with at least 50% aggregate to apply for MBA course.To know more about an MBA programme,click here.

faqs.question: How many specialisations are offered under MBA programme by Starex University?
faqs.answer: Starex University, Gurgaon offers a two-year MBA course in six different specialisations. The mode of study for all the MBA programmes is full-time. The MBA specialisations offered by the university are mentioned in the table given below:MBA SpecialisationsBusiness AnalyticsFinanceHuman ResourcesInternational BusinessRetailSales & Marketing

faqs.question: What are the cutoff marks required for MBA?
faqs.answer: The cutoff marks for the MBA for the general category will go around 97 to 100 percentile in the CAT Exam. This is for the top colleges IIM Calcutta, Ahmedabad etc.The minimum you need to score is 90 percentile to get admission to other colleges for MBA. It depends on the college and number of seats they are offering.

faqs.question: Can I join STAREX University directly?
faqs.answer: Starex University offers admission to UG and PG courses based on a test conducted by the university. The university also conducts a personal interview round for selection. Aspirants are first required to apply for their preferred course and then participate in the selection rounds for admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Starex University eligibility criteria varies course-wise. Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 for UG courses and graduation for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility criteria for top Starex University courses:CourseCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with PCM as compulsory subjects with at least 45% aggregateMBABachelor's degree of a minimum of 3 years with at least 50% aggregateBPharmClass 12 with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects and Biology/ Mathematics with at least 45% aggregateBCAClass 12 with at least 45% aggregateBAClass 12 with at least 45% aggregate

faqs.question: Are admissions at STAREX University entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Starex University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates need to appear for the test or personal interview round to get admission in UG or PG programmes. After final selection is over, candidates are informed by mail or call by the authorities. The shortlisted candidates then need to come for document verification and pay the admission fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for MBA and what is the minimum University Entrance Exam percentage required?
faqs.answer: For the selection process for an MBA degree:You must have secured 50% in your bachelor's degree of a minimum of 3 years. For the Reserved category, it is 45%.For admission, you must have cleared any national-level exam like the CAT or you can opt for an entrance exam done by the university.After clearing the exam you will get a call for an interview. You will get admission only after clearing the interview.Entrance test weightage is 60% while for an interview it is 40%.

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing BCom degree at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Yes, students who are pursuing their BCom degree from Starex University can apply to any government job. They can look forward to placements related to Finance, Auditing, Financial Administration, Taxation, etc. For most of the government jobs, graduates are required to appear for competitive exams conducted by various recruiting organisations. Tabulated below are some prospective government jobs for BCom graduates along with their average salaries: Bank Probationary Officer (PO): INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA LIC AAO: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS Clerk: INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA RRB NTPC: INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA SSC CHSL: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS PO: INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned salary package are industry-based average payouts. The actual salary may vary.

faqs.question: What is the cost of studying BPharm at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Starex University BPharmacy fees include multiple components such as tuition fees, hostel fees, caution deposits, admission fees, alumni charges, library membership, etc. The total tuition fee for the four-year course is INR 3 lakh and the hostel charges are up to INR 96,000 and one-time fee is INR 5,000 . This given tuition fee is as per the Haryana State Technical Education Society and is calculated as per the first-year semester fee. Hence, the amount may vary.

For B.Tech, there is a separate building in which all classes are air-conditioned and well maintained. Many kinds of labs are available to perform practicals. Wi-Fi is available 24X7. There is a central library where we can get all the books we need. The buildings of the hostels are well maintained. Three types of rooms are available, i.e., single-seater, double-seater,...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. All kinds of facilities are available for students according to requirements. Classrooms are spacious with well-ventilated. Wi-Fi is enabled 24X7 for students and faculty members. All kinds of laboratories are available like digital electronics laboratories, physics laboratories, computer laboratories, etc. There is a huge library that is well-stocked. Hostels are good and the fee is also affordable. Hostel rooms are fully furnished. Air-conditioned and non-air-c...

data.description: Yes, Starex University has a separate hostel for boys and girls. The dormitories have all the basic facilities for the students with fully furnished rooms with all the necessary amenities. The hostel is Wi-Fi enabled, with 24*7 electricity, and water supply. The hostel has a proper security system and biometric machines regulate entry and exit.

paragraphs: Tution fee for B.Sc. i STAREX University is around 1.6L-3.9L, with the total including some more such as examination fees (and as per one's requirements) hostel and mess fees, with the average number going around 1.2L Per year for many students.So you must look at the expenses individually to decide whether you would have to spend some money there or not.

The fee for the Starex University Gurgaon MBA course is INR 3 lakh. This course fee is calculated on the basis of first-semester fees and includes components such as tuition fees. The candidates availing of the hostel facilities have to pay the hostel charges as well, which sums up to INR 2.25 lakh. In addition, the mentioned hostel fee is for Non-AC (3-Sharing) plus the security charges. At the time of application form filling, aspirants have to pay the application fee as well to submit the form successfully.

STAREX University is moderately costly if we see other factors side by side. The B.Tech fees at this University is around INR 3.2 lakh- 4.8 lakh and the MBA fees is also around INR 3 lakh. It can be said that the fees in not too much expensive but is expensive. Other colleges charge less fees than this as offer better ROI than this university. The average package offered is INR 10 LPA and average is INR 3 LPA. Seeing the return on fees invested, it's okay. So if  a student is trying to pursue any course from this university he/she should consider other factors also such as Facility, Infrastructure etc. and feedback from current students should also be taken.

The fee for all the various courses at the Starex university varies greatly depending upon the duration and specialisation of the program. Tution fee for MBA is around 3L Tution fee for MCA is around 1.4L Tution fee for B.Sc. is around 1.6L-3.9L Tution fee for B.Pharma is around 3L Tution fee for BPT is around 3.2L Tution fee for M.Sc. is around 1L-1.6L Tution fee for B.E./B.Tech is around 3.2L-4.8L
just to give some insights, One must look at official recent sources too as the values might change from time to time.
